item.description:
How to set application switching on current workspace only

gsettings set org.gnome.shell.app-switcher current-workspace-only true

Errors

petalinux-config -c rootfs
[INFO] generating Kconfig for projectERROR: Failed to generate /home/euikook/working/oran/xilinx/102/build/misc/config/Kconfig.syshwERROR: Failed to Kconfig projectERROR: Failed to config rootfs.

petalinux-config with the -v option

petalinux-config -c rootfs -v
[INFO] generating Kconfig for projectpackage require hsi FAILED:invalid command name "hsi::create_dt_node" while executing"hsi::create_dt_node -help" (in namespace eval "::hsi::help" script line 6) invoked from within"namespace eval ::hsi::help { variable version 0.1 ::xsdb::setcmdmeta {hsi create_dt_node} categories {hsi} ::xsdb::setcmdmeta {hsi create..." (file "/home/euikook/Tools/Xilinx/PetaLinux/2019.2/tools/xsct/scripts/xsct/hsi/hsihelp.tcl" line 25) invoked from within"source /home/euikook/Tools/Xilinx/PetaLinux/2019.2/tools/xsct/scripts/xsct/hsi/hsihelp.tcl" ("package ifneeded hsi::help 0.1" script)ERROR: Failed to generate /home/euikook/working/oran/xilinx/102/build/misc/config/Kconfig.syshwERROR: Failed to Kconfig projectERROR: Failed to config rootfs.

Arch linux

yay -Syu ncurses5-compat-libs

Others

Create synblic link

sudo ln -s libtinfo.so.6 /usr/lib/libtinfo.so.5sudo ln -s libncursesw.so.6.2 /usr/lib/libncursesw.so.5

Remove Linx

sudo rm -rf /usr/lib/libtinfo.so.5 /usr/lib/libncursesw.so.5

item.title: About
item.description:
About

Biography

  • мҶҢн”„нҠёмӣЁм–ҙ к°ңл°ңмһҗ мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.
  • лҢҖн•ңлҜјкөӯ лҢҖм „м—җ кұ°мЈјн•ҳкі  мһҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

Contacts

  • euikook at gmail.com

item.title: Alt_R as Hangul on Ubuntu 18.04
item.description:
Alt_R as Hangul on Ubuntu 18.04

Troubles

  • мҳҒл¬ё нӮӨліҙл“ң кө¬мһ…
  • мҳӨлҘёмӘҪ Alt нӮӨ (Alt_R)мқ„ н•ңкёҖ нӮӨлЎң мӮ¬мҡ© н•ҳкі  мӢ¶мқҢ.
  • IBus л“ұм—җм„ң н•ң/мҳҒ ліҖнҷҳмқ„ Alt_R нӮӨлЎң л“ұлЎқ
    • лӢӨлҘё н”„лЎңк·ёлһЁм—җм„ңлҠ” мһҳ лҸҷмһ‘.
    • Alt_R нӮӨлҘј лӢЁм¶•нӮӨлЎң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” н”„лЎңк·ёлһЁ(Chrome)л“ұм—җм„ңлҠ” лҸҷмһ‘мқҙ м•ҲлҗЁ
  • Ctrl_RмқҖ Hanja нӮӨлЎң л§Өн•‘ мӢңнӮӨкі  мӢ¶мқҙ м•ҠмқҢ.

Use Xmodmap

Hangul key

xmodmap -e 'remove mod1 = Alt_R' # Alt_Rмқҳ кё°ліё нӮӨ л§Өн•‘ м ңкұ°xmodmap -e 'keycode 108 = Hangul' # Alt_Rмқ„ Hangul нӮӨлЎң л§Өн•‘

Hanja Key

xmodmap -e 'remove control = Control_R'xmodmap -e 'keycode 105 = Hangul_Hanja'

Save permanently

xmodmap -pke > ~/.Xmodmap

Troubles

ubuntu 18.04 лЎң к°Җл©ҙм„ң X11 мқҙ м•„лӮҳлқј Waylandк°Җ кё°ліё X м„ңлІ„лЎң ліҖкІҪ лҗҳл©ҙм„ң xmodmapмқҖ лҚ”мқҙмғҒ лҸ„мһ‘ н•ҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ.xmodmapмқҙ лҸҷмһ‘ н•ҳкІҢ н•ҳл Өл©ҙ кё°ліё X м„ңлІ„лҘј xorgлЎң ліҖкІҪ н•ҳм—¬м•ј н•ңлӢӨ.

Use Gnome Tweak Tool

Run Gnome Tweaks Tool > Keyboard & Mouse > Additional Layout Options > Korean Hangul/Hanja KeysCheck Right Alt as Hangul, right Ctrl as Hanja

Troubles

мһҳ лҸҷмһ‘н•ңлӢӨ. н•ҳм§Җл§Ң Ctrl_R нӮӨ к№Ңм§Җ н•ңмһҗнӮӨлЎң л§Өн•‘лҗҳм–ҙ VirtualBox мӮ¬мҡ©мӢң Host KeyлҘј ліҖкІҪ н•ҙмЈјм–ҙ м•ј н•ңлӢӨ.

Use XKB

Edit /usr/share/X11/xkb/symbols/altwin

// Meta is mapped to second level of Alt.partial modifier_keysxkb_symbols "meta_alt" { key <LALT> { [ Alt_L, Meta_L ] }; key <RALT> { type[Group1] = "TWO_LEVEL", symbols[Group1] = [ Alt_R, Meta_R ] }; modifier_map Mod1 { Alt_L, Alt_R, Meta_L, Meta_R };// modifier_map Mod4 {};};
// Meta is mapped to second level of Alt.partial modifier_keysxkb_symbols "meta_alt" { key <LALT> { [ Alt_L, Meta_L ] }; key <RALT> { type[Group1] = "TWO_LEVEL", symbols[Group1] = [ Hangul ] }; modifier_map Mod1 { Alt_L, Alt_R, Meta_L, Meta_R };// modifier_map Mod4 {};};

References

  • https://zapary.blogspot.com/2014/08/ubuntu-xkb-keyboard-map.html

item.title: Arch Linix Installation Guide
item.description:
Arch Linix Installation Guide

нҳ„мһ¬ к°Җм§Җкі  мһҲлҠ” мӢңмҠӨн…ң мң„мЈјлЎң м„ӨлӘ…н•ңлӢӨ.

л¶ҖнҠё л””мҠӨнҒ¬ л§Ңл“Өкё°

ISO нҢҢмқјмқ„ лӢӨмҡҙлЎңл“ң н•ңлӢӨ. лӢӨмҡҙлЎңл“ң нӣ„ н•„мҡ”н•ң кІҪмҡ° gpg лӘ…л №мңјлЎң нҢҢмқјмқ„ кІҖмҰқн•ңлӢӨ.

gpg --keyserver-options auto-key-retrieve --verify archlinux-2020.11.01-x86_64.iso.sig

м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ Can't check signature: No public key м—җлҹ¬к°Җ л°ңмғқн•ҳл©ҙ

gpg --keyserver-options auto-key-retrieve --verify archlinux-2020.11.01-x86_64.iso.siggpg: assuming signed data in 'archlinux-2020.11.01-x86_64.iso'gpg: Signature made Sun 01 Nov 2020 03:42:16 PM KSTgpg: using RSA key 4AA4767BBC9C4B1D18AE28B77F2D434B9741E8ACgpg: Can't check signature: No public key

м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ нӮӨм„ңлІ„лҘј м§Җм •н•ҙ мӨҖлӢӨ.

gpg --keyserver-options auto-key-retrieve --keyserver=hkp://pool.sks-keyservers.net --verify archlinux-2020.11.01-x86_64.iso.sig

л¶ҖнҠё л””мҠӨнҒ¬ мғқм„ұ

dd bs=4M if=~/Downloads/archlinux-2020.11.01-x86_64.iso of=/dev/sdb status=progress oflag=sync

л¶ҖнҠё л””мҠӨнҒ¬лЎң л¶ҖнҢ…н•ңлӢӨ.

Prerequisite

л¶ҖнҠё л””мҠӨнҒ¬лЎң л¶ҖнҢ… нӣ„ мүҳмқҙ лңЁл©ҙ л¶ҖнҢ…мқҙ мҷ„л Ө лҗңкІғмқҙлӢӨ. м„Өм№ҳлҘј мң„н•ң мӮ¬м „ мӨҖл№„ мһ‘м—…мқ„ мӢңмһ‘н•ңлӢӨ.

л„ӨнҠёмӣҢнҒ¬ м—°кІ° нҷ•мқё

м•„лһҳ лӘ…л №мңјлЎң л„ӨнҠёмӣҢнҒ¬ м—°кІ°мқ„ нҷ•мқён•ңлӢӨ.

ip link ping -c 3 google.co.kr

м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ pingмқҙ м„ұкіө н•ҳл©ҙ л„ӨнҠёмӣҢнҒ¬ м—°кІ°мқҙ м„ұкіөн•ңкІғмқҙлӢӨ.

ping -c 3 google.co.krPING google.co.kr (172.217.161.67) 56(84) bytes of data.64 bytes from nrt20s09-in-f3.1e100.net (172.217.161.67): icmp_seq=1 ttl=116 time=46.8 ms64 bytes from nrt20s09-in-f3.1e100.net (172.217.161.67): icmp_seq=2 ttl=116 time=39.2 ms64 bytes from nrt20s09-in-f3.1e100.net (172.217.161.67): icmp_seq=3 ttl=116 time=39.2 ms--- google.co.kr ping statistics ---3 packets transmitted, 3 received, 0% packet loss, time 2002msrtt min/avg/max/mdev = 39.260/41.786/46.802/3.546 ms

Update system clock (optional)

timedatectl set-ntp true

Bootstrapping

Partition the disk

fdisk -l /dev/nvme0n1
Mount PointPartitionPartition TypeSizeNotes
/mnt/boot/dev/nvme0n1p1EFI system partition512MiB
/mnt/dev/nvme0n1p2Linux filesystem64GB
/mnt/home/dev/nvme0n1p3Linux filesystemRemainder of the device

лі„лҸ„мқҳ SWAP нҢҢнӢ°м…ҳмқ„ мғқм„ұн•ҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ. SWAP нҢҢнӢ°м…ҳмқҙ н•„мҡ”н•  кІҪмҡ° swap fileмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ңлӢӨ.

к°Җмҡ© л””мҠӨнҒ¬ мҡ©лҹүмқҙ м¶©л¶„н•ҳкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ мӢңмҠӨн…ңмқҙ м„Өм№ҳлҗ  нҢҢнӢ°м…ҳ(/)кіј /home нҢҢнӢ°м…ҳмқ„ л¶„лҰ¬ н•ңлӢӨ.OS мһ¬м„ӨмӢң /home нҢҢнӢ°м…ҳмқ„ мң м§Җн•ҳл©ҙм„ң OSлҘј м„Өм№ҳ н•  мҲҳ мһҲкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ OS мһ¬м„Өм№ҳ мӢң мң лҰ¬н•ңлӢӨ.

fdisk, cfdisk, gfdisk лӘ…л № мӨ‘ мӣҗн•ҳлҠ” нҢҢнӢ°м…”лӢқ н”„лЎңк·ёлһЁмңјлЎң нҢҢнӢ°м…ҳмқ„ м§„н–үн•ңлӢӨ.

cfdisk /dev/nvme0n1

Format the partitions

mkfs.vfat -F32 /dev/nvme0n1p1mkfs.ext4 -j /dev/nvme0n1p2mkfs.ext4 -j /dev/nvme0n1p3

Mount filesystem

mount /dev/nvme0n1p2 /mntmkdir -p /mnt/bootmount /dev/nvme0n1p1 /mnt/bootmkdir -o /mnt/homemount /dev/nvme0n1p3 /mnt/home

Update Mirror List

vi /etc/pacman.d/mirrorlist

м•„лһҳ лқјмқёмқ„ м„ңлІ„лҰ¬мҠӨнҠё к°ҖмһҘ мң„м—җ м¶”к°Җн•ңлӢӨ.

Server = http://mirror.premi.st/archlinux/$repo/os/$archServer = http://ftp.lanet.kr/pub/archlinux/$repo/os/$archServer = https://ftp.lanet.kr/pub/archlinux/$repo/os/$archServer = http://ftp.harukasan.org/archlinux/$repo/os/$archServer = https://ftp.harukasan.org/archlinux/$repo/os/$arch

pacstrap

pacstrap /mnt base linux linux-firmware vim networkmanager base-devel man-db man-pages texinfo dosfstools e2fsprogs

Generate /etc/fstab

genfstab -U /mnt >> /mnt/etc/fstab

chrooting

arch-chroot /mnt
ln -sf /usr/share/zoneinfo/Asia/Seoul /etc/localtime

Generating locales

Edit /etc/locale.gen and uncomment en_US.UTF-8 UTF-8. Generate the locales by running

locake-gen

Create locale.conf

echo "LANG=en_US.UTF-8" >> /etc/locale.confecho "LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8" >> /etc/locale.conf

Network Configuration

Set Hostname

echo Coconut > /etc/hostname

add to hosts

127.0.0.1localhost::1localhost127.0.1.1coconut.localdomain coconut

Enable NetworkManager service

systemctl enable NetworkManager.service

initramfs

mkinitcpio -P
passwd

Create primary user

useradd -m -G users,wheel -s /bin/bash euikook

Set password to euikook

passwd euikook

Enable sudo command to wheel groups

Run visudo command and uncomment %wheel ALL=(ALL:ALL) ALL

%wheel ALL=(ALL:ALL) ALL

Install bootloader (GRUB)

pacman -Syupacman -S grub efibootmgt
grub-install --target=x86_64-efi --eif-directory=/boot --bootloader-id=arch --recheck

Edit /etc/default/grub

grub-mkconfig -o /boot/grub/grub.cfg

Finish bootstrapping

Exit from chroot

exit

Un-Mount mounted directories

umount -R /mnt
shutdown -r now

Post bootstrapping

Intel Microcode

sudo pacman -S intel-ucodegrub-mkconfig -o /boot/grub/grub.cfg

GUI м„Өм№ҳ

нҢЁнӮӨм§Җ лҰ¬мҠӨнҠё м—…лҚ°мқҙнҠё

sudo pacman -Syu

Gnome м„Өм№ҳ

sudo pacman -S xorg-server gnomesudo systemctl enable gdb

к·ёлһҳн”Ҫ м№ҙл“ң л“ңлқјмқҙлІ„ м„Өм№ҳ

sudo pacman -S xf86-video-intelsudo pacman -S nvidia xf86-video-intel

кё°нғҖ м–ҙн”ҢлҰ¬мјҖмқҙм…ҳ м„Өм№ҳ

pacman -S firefox
sudo shutdown -r now

Package from AUR

cd ~/Downloadsgit clone https://aur.archlinux.org/yay.gitcd yaymakepkg -sic

Fonts

 sudo yay -S ttf-nanum

Google Chrome

sydo yay -S google-chrome

н•ңкёҖ мһ…л Ҙ м„Өм •

sudo pacman -S ibus ibus-hangul

Terminalм—җм„ң ibus-setup мқ„ мӢӨн–үн•ңлӢӨ.

ibus-setup
  • Input Methodм—җ лӢӨлҘё м–ём–ҙл“ӨмқҖ лӘЁл‘җ мӮӯм ң н•ҳкі  Korean - Hangulмқ„ м¶”к°Җ н•ңлӢӨ.
  • Korean - Hangulмқ„ м„ нғқн•ң мғҒнғңм—җм„ң PreferencesлҘј нҒҙлҰӯн•ҳм—¬ ibus-hangul м„Өм •мқ„ м§„н–үн•ңлӢӨ.
    • н•ңмҳҒ м „нҷҳ нӮӨ л“ұ

Settings > Region & Language > Input Sources

Korean(Hangul)мқ„ м¶”к°Җн•ңлӢӨ.

н•ң/мҳҒ м „нҷҳнӮӨк°Җ м—ҶлҠ” нӮӨліҙл“ңм—җм„ң Right RALTлҘј н•ң/мҳҒ м „нҷҳнӮӨлЎң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкё°

лӘҮк°Җм§Җ л°©лІ•мқҙ мһҲм§Җл§Ң к°ҖмһҘ мү¬мҡҙ л°©лІ•мқҖ Gnome Tweak нҲҙм—җм„ң лӢӨмқҢкіј к°ҷмқҙ м„Өм •н•ңлӢӨ.

Tweak > Keyboard @ Mouse > Additional Layout Options > Korean Hangul/Hanja Keys > Make right Alt a Hangul key м„ нғқ

мқҙмң лҘј нҷ•мқё н•ҙліҙм§ҖлҠ” м•Ҡм•ҳм§Җл§Ң xev л“ұмқҳ лӘ…л №мңјлЎң нҷ•мқён•ҙліҙл©ҙ RALT нӮӨк°Җ ISO_Level3_shiftлЎң м„Өм • лҗң кІҪмҡ°к°Җ мһҲлӢӨ. мқҙ кІҪмҡ° Tweak > Keyboard @ Mouse > Additional Layout Options > Key to choose the 3rd level > Right Alt м„ нғқмқ„ н•ҙм ңн•ңлӢӨ.

Auto completion for sudo command

~/.bashrc

complate -cf sudo

Logitech Mouse м„Өм •

Install Logiops logiops-git^AUR^

yay -S logiops-git

Create /etc/logid.cfg file as following:

devices: ({ name: "Logitech Wireless Mouse MX Master 3"; // A lower threshold number makes the wheel switch to free-spin mode // quicker when scrolling fast. smartshift: { on: true; threshold: 20; }; hiresscroll: { hires: true; invert: false; target: false; }; // Higher numbers make the mouse more sensitive (cursor moves faster), // 4000 max for MX Master 3. dpi: 3000; buttons: ( // Make thumb button 10. { cid: 0xc3; action = { type: "Keypress"; keys: ["BTN_FORWARD"]; }; }, // Make top button 11. { cid: 0xc4; action = { type: "Keypress"; keys: ["BTN_BACK"]; }; } );});

Insync 3.x

Install Insync^AUR^

yay -S insync

мһ¬м„Өм№ҳ мқҙкі  мқҙм „ лҚ°мқҙн„°лҘј лӘЁл‘җ к°Җм§Җкі  мһҲлӢӨл©ҙ мӢӨн–үм „ мқҙм „ лЁёмӢ мқҳ ~/.config/Insync л””л үн„°лҰ¬лҘј ліөмӮ¬ н•ҳм—¬ лҚ®м–ҙ м“°л©ҙ мқҙм „ м„Өм •мқ„ к·ёлҢҖлЎң мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ.

rsync -avz -e ssh ${OLDBOX}:/home/${USER}/.config/Insync ~/.config

Autostart with Login

~/.config/autostart/insync.desktop

[Desktop Entry]Version=1.0Type=ApplicationName=InsyncGenericName=InsyncComment=Launch InsyncIcon=insyncCategories=Network;Exec=insync startTryExec=insyncTerminal=falseX-GNOME-Autostart-Delay=15

Tray Icons^Extention^ нҷ•мһҘмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ңлӢӨл©ҙ X-GNOME-Autostart-Delay=15 мҳөм…ҳмқ„ мЈјм–ҙм•ј н•ңлӢӨ.

item.title: Auto mount removable drives to specific mounting point
item.description:
Auto mount removable drives to specific mounting point

Check Block identifier for disk using blkid command.

blkid
blkid /dev/sda2/dev/sda2: UUID="ef6e4eba-7ad9-4a4c-be75-3b85ba2d14a3" BLOCK_SIZE="4096" TYPE="ext4" PARTUUID="39b52ccd-5972-4bb7-ba9b-279441d990df"

<blkid> is ef6e4eba-7ad9-4a4c-be75-3b85ba2d14a3

Unmount disk if it alrady mounted

sudo umount /dev/sda2

Edit /etc/fstab

# Disk from USBUUID=ef6e4eba-7ad9-4a4c-be75-3b85ba2d14a3/home/data ext4 noauto,rw,relatime0 2

/usr/local/bin/usb-mount

#!/bin/bashUUID=$2DEVF=$(blkid --uuid ${UUID})[[ -n ${DEVF} ]] || { echo " No such disk partition from ${UUID}" exit -1}# Check partition already mountedMOUNTED=$(/bin/mount | /bin/grep ${DEVF} | /usr/bin/awk '{ print $3 }')start() { [[ -n ${MOUNTED} ]] || { /bin/mount -U ${UUID} }}stop(){ [[ -n ${MOUNTED} ]] && { /bin/umount -l ${DEVF} } || exit 0}status() { /bin/mount | /bin/grep ${DEVF} || exit 0}case "${1:-status}" in start) start ;; stop) stop;; restart)stopstart ;; status)status;; *) echo "Usage: $0 {start|stop|restart|status}" >&2 exit 1 ;;esac
sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/usb-mount`

cat /etc/systemd/system/usb.mount@.service

[Unit]Description=Mount USB Disk %i[Service]Type=oneshotRemainAfterExit=trueExecStart=/usr/local/bin/usb.mount start %iExecStop=/usr/local/bin/usb.mount stop %i
sudo systemctl daemon-reload

Create /etc/udev/rules.d/99-usb-ssd.rules

ACTION=="add", SUBSYSTEM=="block", ENV{ID_FS_UUID}=="ef6e4eba-7ad9-4a4c-be75-3b85ba2d14a3", ENV{UDISKS_IGNORE}="1", RUN+="/usr/bin/systemctl start usb.mount@$env{ID_FS_UUID}.service"ACTION=="remove", SUBSYSTEM=="block", ENV{ID_FS_UUID}=="ef6e4eba-7ad9-4a4c-be75-3b85ba2d14a3", ENV{UDISKS_IGNORE}="1", RUN+="/usr/bin/systemctl stop usb.mount@$env{ID_FS_UUID}.service"
sudo udevadm control --reload-rules && sudo udevadm trigger

item.title: Building Docker Image for Cross Platform(ARM64, ARM)
item.description:
Building Docker Image for Cross Platform

arm64 лЁёмӢ кіј x86 лЁёмӢ м—җм„ң лҸҷмһ‘н•ҙм•ј н•ҳлҠ” н”„лЎңм қнҠёлҘј м§„н–үн•ҳкІҢ лҗҳм—ҲлӢӨ. лҸҷмқјн•ң мҶҢмҠӨ нҠёлҰ¬лҘј мң м§Җн•ҳм§Җ мң„н•ҙ н•ҳлӮҳмқҳ м•„нӮӨн…ҚмІҳлЎң мһ‘м—…н•ҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ° ліҙлӢӨ лҚ” л§ҺмқҖ л…ёл Ҙмқҙ нҢ”мҡ”н•ҳм§Җл§Ң н”„лЎңм қнҠё м§„н–ү мӨ‘ к°ҖмһҘ к·Җм°®(м§ңмҰқлӮҳлҠ”)мқҖ мһ‘м—…мқҖ н…ҢмҠӨнҠёлҘј мң„н•ҙ arm64кіј x86 лЁёмӢ м—җм„ң мқҙлҜём§ҖлҘј л”°лЎң л№Ңл“ң н•ҙм•ј н•ҳлҠ” кІғмқҙм—ҲлӢӨ.

к°ңл°ң м„ңлІ„(PC)м—җм„ң ARM мқҙлҜём§ҖлҘј л№Ңл“ң н•ҳлҠ” л°©лІ•мқ„ м°ҫлҚҳ мӨ‘ qemuмқҳ arm emulation кё°лҠҘмқ„ мқҙмҡ©н•ҳм—¬ x86 лЁёмӢ м—җм„ң armмҡ© Docker мқҙлҜём§ҖлҘј Cross Build н•ҳлҠ” л°©лІ•мқ„ м°ҫм•„ кіөмң н•ңлӢӨ.

Install Docker

sudo apt updatesudo apt dist-upgrade
curl -fsSL test.docker.com -o get-docker.sh && sh get-docker.sh

And add current user to docker group

sudo usermode -aG docker $USER

Install buildx for multi-architecture image build

DOCKER_CLI_EXPERIMENTAL мҳөм…ҳмқҙ Enabled лҗҳм–ҙ мһҲм–ҙм•ј мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ. м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ нҷҳкІҪліҖмҲҳлҘј м„Өм •н•ҙ мЈјл©ҙ лҗңлӢӨ.

export DOCKER_CLI_EXPERIMENTAL=enabled

м•„лӢҲл©ҙ ~/.docker/config.json нҢҢмқјм—җ м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ "experimental": "enabled"м¶”к°Җ н•ҳмһҗ.

{"auths": {"https://index.docker.io/v1/": {"auth": "******************"}},"HttpHeaders": {"User-Agent": "Docker-Client/19.03.12 (linux)"},"experimental": "enabled"}

Download a buildx binary release

лӢӨмқҢ мӮ¬мқҙнҠём—җм„ң мөңмӢ  л°”мқҙл„ҲлҰ¬лҘј лӢӨмҡҙ л°ӣм•„ ~/.docker/cli-plugin л””л үн„°лҰ¬м—җ л„ЈлҠ”лӢӨ.

mkdir -p ~/.docker/cli-plugincurl https://github.com/docker/buildx/releases/download/v0.4.2/buildx-v0.4.2.linux-amd64 > ~/.docker/cli-plugin/docker-buildxchmod +x ~/.docker/cli-plugin/docker-buildx

Enable ARM Cross Build

ARMмқ„ нҷңмҡ©н•ҳм—¬ м ҒлӢ№н•ң л№Ңл“ң мӢңмҠӨн…ңмқ„ кө¬м„ұн•ҳкё°к°Җ м–ҙл өлӢӨ. лқјмҰҲлІ лҰ¬ нҢҢмқҙ(Raspberry Pi)л“ұмңјлЎң л№Ңл“ң лЁёмӢ мқ„ л§Ңл“Ө мһҲм§Җл§Ң лӮ®мқҖ м„ұлҠҘмңјлЎң мқён•ҙ н•ҳлЈЁмў…мқј мқҙлҜём§Җл§Ң л№Ңл“ң н•ҳлҠ” мІҙн—ҳмқ„ н•  мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ. x86 мӢңмҠӨн…ңмқ„ мқҙмҡ©н•ҳм—¬ Cross Build н•ҳлҠ” кІғмқҙ лҚ” л№ лҘё кІҪмҡ°к°Җ лҚ” л§ҺлӢӨ.

м•„лһҳмҷҖ лӘ…л №мқ„ мӢӨн–үн•ҳм—¬ ARM Emulation кё°лҠҘмқ„ Enableн•ҳмһҗ.

docker run --rm --privileged linuxkit/binfmt:v0.8

м•„лһҳмҷҖ лӘ…л №мқ„ нҶөн•ҙ кё°лҠҘмқ„ нҷ•мқён•ңлӢӨ.

cat /proc/sys/fs/binfmt_misc/qemu-aarch64

лӢӨмқҢкіј л№„мҠ·н•ң кІ°кіјк°Җ лӮҳмҳЁлӢӨ

enabledinterpreter /usr/bin/qemu-aarch64flags: OCFoffset 0magic 7f454c460201010000000000000000000200b7mask ffffffffffffff00fffffffffffffffffeffff

Create Multi-Architecture build instance

Using QUEM Emulation

л№Ңл“ң нҷҳкІҪмқ„ кө¬м„ұн•ңлӢӨ.

docker buildx create --name crossdocker buildx use crossdocker buildx inspect --bootstrap
Name: crossDriver: docker-containerNodes:Name: cross-builder0Endpoint: unix:///var/run/docker.sockStatus: runningPlatforms: linux/amd64, linux/arm64, linux/riscv64, linux/ppc64le, linux/s390x, linux/386, linux/arm/v7, linux/arm/v6

Using Native Build Machine

м„ұлҠҘ мўӢмқҖ ARMмҡ© л№Ңл“ң лЁёмӢ мқҙ мһҲлҠ” кІҪмҡ° н•ҙлӢ№ л№Ңл“ң лЁёмӢ мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳл©ҙ лҗңлӢӨ.

нҺёмқҳмғҒ ARMмҡ© л№Ңл“ң лЁёмӢ мқ„ build-arm мқҙлқјкі  н•ҳмһҗ

~/.ssh/config нҢҢмқјмқ„ м—ҙм–ҙ лӢӨмқҢкіј к°ҷмқҙ м ‘мҶҚ м •ліҙлҘј м¶”к°Җ н•ңлӢӨ.

IP мЈјмҶҢмқё 1.2.3.4 мҷҖ Username userлҠ” нҷҳкІҪм—җ л§һкІҢ мҲҳм •н•ңлӢӨ.

Host build-arm 1.2.3.4 Hostname 1.2.3.4 User user Port 22 SendEnv LANG LC_* IdentityFile ~/.ssh/build-arm ConnectTimeout 0 HashKnownHosts yes GSSAPIAuthentication yes GSSAPIDelegateCredentials no

ssh-keygen лӘ…л №мқ„ нҶөн•ҙ ssh keyлҘј мғқм„ұн•ңлӢӨ.

ssk-keygen -t ras -b 4096 -f build-arm

Public KeyлҘј build-armмңјлЎң ліөмӮ¬н•ңлӢӨ.

cp build-arm.pub build-arm:.ssh/authorized_keys

Private нҢҢмқјмқ„ ~/.ssh л””л үн„°лҰ¬лҸ„ ліөмӮ¬н•ңлӢӨ.

ssh build-arm ~/.ssh/build-arm

Passowrd м—Ҷмқҙ м ‘мҶҚ лҗҳлҠ”м§Җ нҷ•мқён•ңлӢӨ.

ssh build-arm

Create buildx instance

лЁјм Җ build-arm лЁёмӢ м—җ лҢҖн•ң docker contextлҘј мғқм„ұн•ңлӢӨ.

docker context create build-arm --docker "host=ssh://build-arm"

л№Ңл“ң лЁёмӢ build-armмқ„ buildx instanceм—җ м¶”к°Җ н•ңлӢӨ.

docker buildx create --append --name cross-builder build-arm

Build Docker images

мқҙм ң buildx нҷ•мһҘмқ„ лӘ…л №мқ„ мқҙмҡ©н•ҳм—¬ Docker мқҙлҜём§ҖлҘј мғқм„ұн•ҙ ліҙмһҗ.

м•„лһҳлҠ” н…ҢмҠӨнҠём—җ мӮ¬мҡ©лҗ  Dockerfile мҳҲм ңмқҙлӢӨ.

FROM alpine:edgeLABEL maintainer="E.K. KIM euikook@gmail.com"COPY apps /appsWORKDIR /apps

buildxлҘј мқҙмҡ©н•ҳм—¬ мқҙлҜём§ҖлҘј л№Ңл“ңн•ңлӢӨ. м•„лһҳ мҳҲм ңлҠ” linux/arm64,linux/amd64 Architectureм—җ мӮ¬мҡ©к°ҖлҠҘн•ң мқҙлҜём§ҖлҘј мғқм„ұн•ҳлҠ” мҳҲмқҙлӢӨ. м Ғмҡ© к°ҖлҠҘн•ң Platform мқҖ docker buildx inspect лӘ…л №мңјлЎң нҷ•мқё н•ҳмҳҖмқ„ л•Ң Platformsм—җ лӮҳм—ҙлҗҳм–ҙмһҲлҠ” Platformл§Ң к°ҖлҠҘн•ҳлӢӨ.

docker buildx build --push --platform linux/arm64,linux/amd64 --tag euikook/multi-arch-test:latest .

мң„ buildx build лӘ…л №мқҖ –push мҳөм…ҳкіј к°ҷмқҙ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҙм•ј лҗңлӢӨ. лӢ№м—°н•ҳкІҢлҸ„ мң„ лӘ…л №мқҙ лЎңм»¬ мқҙлҜём§ҖлҘј мғқм„ұн•ҳм§ҖлҠ” м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ. л”°лқјм„ң мғқм„ұлҗң мқҙлҜём§ҖлҘј н…ҢмҠӨнҠё н•ҳкё° мң„н•ҙм„ңлҠ” docker pull лӘ…л №мңјлЎң мқҙлҜём§ҖлҘј лӢӨмҡҙлЎңл“ң л°ӣм•„м•ј н•ңлӢӨ.

docker pull euikook/multi-arch-test:latestмқҙкІҢ мқҙлҜём§Җк°Җ лЎңм»¬ лЁёмӢ м—җ м—Ҷмңјл©ҙ мғҒкҙҖ м—ҶлҠ”лҚ° docker build лӮҳ docker-compose buildлӘ…л №мңјлЎң мқҙлҜём§ҖлҘј мғқм„ұн•ң лӢӨмқҢ buildx лӘ…л №мңјлЎң мқҙлҜём§ҖлҘј мғқм„ұн•ң кІҪмҡ° docker pull лӘ…л №мңјлЎң мқҙлҜём§ҖлҘј лӘ…мӢңм ҒмңјлЎң лӢӨмҡҙл°ӣм§Җ м•Ҡмңјл©ҙ мқҙм „м—җ мғқм„ұн–ҲлҚҳ мқҙлҜём§Җк°Җ мӢӨн–үлҗҳм–ҙ мӣҗн•ҳлҠ” кІ°кіјмқ„ м–»мқ„ мҲҳ м—ҶлӢӨ.

м—¬кё°лҘј л°©л¬ён•ҳл©ҙ linux/amd64, linux/arm64 мқҙлҜём§ҖлҘј нҷ•мқё н•  мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.

References

  • https://docs.docker.com/buildx/working-with-buildx/
  • https://www.docker.com/blog/getting-started-with-docker-for-arm-on-linux/

item.title: Change NodePort range local kubernetes
item.description:
Change NodePort range local kubernetes

Add following line to add following line to /etc/kubernetes/manifests/kube-apiserver.yaml

- --service-node-port-range=80-32767

Examples

sudo vi /etc/kubernetes/manifests/kube-apiserver.yaml
- --advertise-address=172.168.2.11- --service-cluster-ip-range=10.96.0.0/12- --service-node-port-range=80-32767- --client-ca-file=/etc/kubernetes/pki/ca.crt

item.title: Development Environment per Project
item.description:
Development environment per project

Motivation

Development environments installed in project directory

/home/$USER/test-project/.env

Example of environment file

TOP_DIR=$(dirname $(realpath $_)). ${TOP_DIR}/venv/bin/activateexport LD_LIBRARY_PATH=${VIRTUAL_ENV}/libcd ${TOP_DIR}

Append alias to shell

~/.aliases

alias test-project-env=". ~/working/test-project/.env"

~/.bashrc or ~/.zshrc

. ~/.aliases

Appply alias without restart shell

source ~/.aliases

onto test-project environment

test-project-env

Using Docker

Create Docker image for development

docker build -t test-project-dev-env:latest .

Run docker image for testing

docker run --rm -it -v $(pwd):/apps test-project-devel bash

item.title: Disable RALT as ISO_Level3_Shift
item.description:
Disable RALT as ISO_Level3_Shift

к·ёлҶҲмқ„ мөңмӢ  лІ„м „мңјлЎң м—…к·ёл Ҳмқҙл“ң н•ҳл©ҙм„ң Right ALT нӮӨк°Җ ISO_Level3_Shift лЎң мқёмӢқ лҗҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ° к°Җ мһҲлӢӨ.

xev

м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ Keycode 108 лІҲмқҙ ISO_Level3_ShiftлЎң мқёмӢқлҗңлӢӨ.

KeyRelease event, serial 37, synthetic NO, window 0x1400001, root 0x529, subw 0x0, time 107702472, (862,0), root:(2932,214), state 0x90, keycode 108 (keysym 0xfe03, ISO_Level3_Shift), same_screen YES, XKeysymToKeycode returns keycode: 92 XLookupString gives 0 bytes: XFilterEvent returns: False

мқҙ кІҪмҡ° Tweak > Keyboard @ Mouse > Additional Layout Options > Key to choose the 3rd level > Right Alt м„ нғқмқ„ н•ҙм ңн•ҳл©ҙ лҗңлӢӨ.

item.title: git fetch all branches and push it to another remote
item.description:
git fetch all branches and push it to another remote

git fetch all branches and tags from origin, then push it to new remote

git fetch --allfor branch in `git branch -r`; do git branch --track ${branch#origin/} $branch; donegit remote add new https://newrepos.com/new.gitgit push new --allgit fetch --tagsgit push new tags

item.title: git fetch all branches and push it to another remote
item.description:
Fix GPG Error on Ubuntu

$ sudo apt update...W: An error occurred during the signature verification. The repository is not updated and the previous index files will be used. GPG error: https://packages.gitlab.com/gitlab/gitlab-ee/ubuntu bionic InRelease: The following signatures couldn't be verified because the public key is not available: NO_PUBKEY 3F01618A51312F3FW: An error occurred during the signature verification. The repository is not updated and the previous index files will be used. GPG error: https://packages.gitlab.com/runner/gitlab-runner/ubuntu bionic InRelease: The following signatures couldn't be verified because the public key is not available: NO_PUBKEY 3F01618A51312F3FW: Failed to fetch https://packages.gitlab.com/gitlab/gitlab-ee/ubuntu/dists/bionic/InRelease The following signatures couldn't be verified because the public key is not available: NO_PUBKEY 3F01618A51312F3FW: Failed to fetch https://packages.gitlab.com/runner/gitlab-runner/ubuntu/dists/bionic/InRelease The following signatures couldn't be verified because the public key is not available: NO_PUBKEY 3F01618A51312F3FW: Some index files failed to download. They have been ignored, or old ones used instead.euikook@argentum:/etc/apt/sources.list.d$ sudo apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 3F01618A51312F3FExecuting: /tmp/apt-key-gpghome.SpBMyBEzT0/gpg.1.sh --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 3F01618A51312F3F

Import GPG key from key server

$ sudo apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 3F01618A51312F3FExecuting: /tmp/apt-key-gpghome.SpBMyBEzT0/gpg.1.sh --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 3F01618A51312F3Fgpg: key 3F01618A51312F3F: public key "GitLab B.V. (package repository signing key) <packages@gitlab.com>" importedgpg: Total number processed: 1gpg: imported: 1
$ sudo apt updateHit:3 https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu bionic InRelease Hit:5 http://ppa.launchpad.net/certbot/certbot/ubuntu bionic InRelease Hit:6 http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu bionic InRelease Hit:1 http://mirror.kakao.com/ubuntu bionic InRelease Get:2 http://mirror.kakao.com/ubuntu bionic-security InRelease [88.7 kB] Get:4 http://mirror.kakao.com/ubuntu bionic-updates InRelease [88.7 kB] Get:7 https://packages.gitlab.com/gitlab/gitlab-ee/ubuntu bionic InRelease [23.3 kB] Get:8 https://packages.gitlab.com/runner/gitlab-runner/ubuntu bionic InRelease [23.4 kB]

item.title: History нҢҢмқјм—җм„ң нҠ№м • м—”нҠёлҰ¬ мӮӯм ңн•ҳкё°
item.description:
Remove specific history entries from history file

History нҢҢмқјм—җм„ң нҠ№м • м—”нҠёлҰ¬ мӮӯм ңн•ҳкё°

History нҢҢмқјм—җм„ң нҠ№м • м—”нҠёлҰ¬ мӮӯм ңн•ҳкё°

В  мһ‘м—…мқ„ н•ҳлӢӨ ліҙл©ҙ лҜјк°җн•ң м •ліҙк°Җ Historyм—җ лӮЁм•„ мһҲлҠ” кІҪмҡ°к°Җ мһҲлӢӨ. лӢӨмқҢкіј к°ҷмқҙ лӘ…л № м•һм—җ white spaceлҘј м¶”к°Җ н•ҳм—¬ н•ҙлӢ№ лӘ…л №мқ„ history нҢҢмқјм—җ лӮЁкё°м§Җ м•ҠлҠ” л°©лІ•мқҙ мһҲлӢӨ.

mysql -u root -ppassword -h localhost

лӘ…л №м•һ л№Ҳм№ё(space)м—җ мЈјлӘ©.

mysql -u root -ppassword -h localhost

м•„м°Ё н•ҳлҠ” мҲңк°„м—җ лҜјк°җн•ң м •ліҙк°Җ Historyм—җ лӮЁм•„ мһҲлҠ” кІҪмҡ°

history1234 mysql -u root -pPASSWORD -h localhost 1235 ls

-d_ мҳөм…ҳмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ н•ҙлӢ№В  м—”нҠёлҰ¬лҘј мӮӯм ңн•ңлӢӨ.В _ _ лӢӨмқҢкіјмқҙ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ңлӢӨ. _

history -d OFFSET
history -d 1234

м§ҖмӣҢм•ј лҗҳлҠ” м—”нҠёлҰ¬мқҳ мҲҳк°Җ л§Һмқ„ кІҪмҡ°В лӢӨмқҢкіј лӘ…л №мңјлЎң нҠ№м • л¬ёмһҗм—ҙмқҙ мқҙ л“Өм–ҙ мһҲлҠ” HistoryлҘј м§Җмҡё мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.

while history -d $(history | grep 'SEARCH-STRING-TO-REMOVE'| head -n 1 | awk {'print $1'}) ; do :; history -w; done

мҳҲлҘј л“Өм–ҙ лӢӨмқҢкіј к°ҷмқҙ мӢӨн–ү н•ҳл©ҙ **ls**к°Җ л“Өм–ҙк°„ лӘЁл“  Historyк°Җ мӮӯм ңлҗңлӢӨ.

while history -d $(history | grep 'mysql'| head -n 1 | awk {'print $1'}) ; do :; history -w; done
history1234 cd

item.title: HOWTO install LDAP Server
item.description:
HOWTO install LDAP Server

ліё нҸ¬мҠӨнҠёлҠ” OpenLDAPмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкі мһҗ н•ҳлҠ” л¶„л“Өм—җкІҢ лҸ„мӣҖмқ„ мЈјкі мһҗ мһ‘м„ұ лҗҳм—ҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

Prerequisite

нҢЁнӮӨм§Җ лҰ¬мҠӨнҠёлҘј мөңмӢ мңјлЎң м—…лҚ°мқҙнҠён•ңлӢӨ.

sudo apt-get update

Important notes

# Configure vim as default editorsudo apt-get install -y vimsudo update-alternatives --set editor /usr/bin/vim.basic

LDAPм—җ мӮ¬мҡ”н•  Domain Nameмқ„ /etc/hosts нҢҢмқјм—җ м¶”к°Җн•ңлӢӨ.

sudo editor /etc/hosts

лӢӨмқҢкіј к°ҷмқҙ м¶”к°Җн•ңлӢӨ.

127.0.1.1 ldap.harues.com ldap ldap.harues.com

OpenLDAP кіј кҙҖл Ё мң нӢёлҰ¬нӢ°лҘј м„Өм№ҳн•ңлӢӨ.

sudo apt-get install slapd ldap-utils -y

This will prompt a setup window so we need to populate it with the correct credentials.

When asked for administrator password use ************.Repeat the password to confirm it.

We will use the advantage of slapd setup to fully configure LDAP instead of filling in the details by hand in a text file:

sudo dpkg-reconfigure slapd

Answer the following questions:

You will be asked to omit OpenLDAP server configuration: NoUnder DNS domain name fill in: harues.comUnder organization name fill in: Harues Inc.Under administrator password fill in: ************Repeat password: ************Database backend to use, select: HDBDo you want database to be removed when slapd is purged: YesMove old database, choose: YesAllow LDAPv2 protocol, choose: No

** If at any point you get the error: **

ldap_bind: Invalid credentials (49)

configure slapd again.

Next, add index to make lookup easier, create a file index.ldif

editor index.ldif

and populate with the following:

dn: olcDatabase={1}hdb,cn=configchangetype: modifyadd: olcDbIndexolcDbIndex: uid eq,pres,sub

and add it to ldap database:

sudo ldapmodify -Q -Y EXTERNAL -H ldapi:/// -f index.ldif

This should produce the following output:

modifying entry "olcDatabase={1}hdb,cn=config"

If this is not the case recheck your steps and try again.

You can verify that all is working:

sudo ldapsearch -Q -LLL -Y EXTERNAL -H ldapi:/// -b cn=config '(olcDatabase={1}hdb)' olcDbIndex

This should produce the following output:

dn: olcDatabase={1}hdb,cn=configolcDbIndex: objectClass eqolcDbIndex: uid eq,pres,sub

If this is not the case recheck your steps and try again.

Next step is to create an ldap user.Create base.ldif

editor base.ldif

and populate with:

dn: ou=Users,dc=harues,dc=comobjectClass: organizationalUnitou: Usersdn: ou=Groups,dc=harues,dc=comobjectClass: organizationalUnitou: Groupsdn: cn=miners,ou=Groups,dc=harues,dc=comobjectClass: posixGroupcn: minersgidNumber: 5000dn: uid=euikook,ou=Users,dc=harues,dc=comobjectClass: organizationalPersonobjectClass: personobjectClass: topobjectClass: inetOrgPersonobjectClass: posixAccountobjectClass: shadowAccountuid: euikooksn: KIMgivenName: E.K.cn: E.K. KIMdisplayName: E.K. KIMuidNumber: 10000gidNumber: 10000userPassword: testgecos: E.K. KIMloginShell: /bin/bashhomeDirectory: /home/euikookmail: euikook@harues.comtelephoneNumber: 000-000-0000st: NYmanager: uid=euikook,ou=Users,dc=harues,dc=comshadowExpire: -1shadowFlag: 0shadowWarning: 7shadowMin: 8shadowMax: 999999shadowLastChange: 10877title: System Administrator

Add the user to the LDAP database:

ldapadd -x -D cn=admin,dc=gitlab,dc=dev -w gitlabldap -f base.ldif

This should produce the following output:

adding new entry "ou=Users,dc=harues,dc=com"adding new entry "uid=euikook,ou=Users,dc=harues,dc=com"

If this is not the case recheck your steps and try again.

To confirm that the user is in LDAP, use:

ldapsearch -x -LLL -b dc=harues,dc=com 'uid=euikook' uid uidNumber displayName mail

and that should produce the output that looks like:

dn: uid=euikook,ou=Users,dc=harues,dc=comuid: euikookdisplayName: E.K. KIMuidNumber: 10000

This would complete setting up the OpenLDAP server. Only thing that is left to do is to give the correct details to GitLab.Under gitlab.yml there is a LDAP section that should look like this:

 ## LDAP settings ldap: enabled: true host: 'ldap.harues.com' base: 'dc=harues,dc=com' port: 389 uid: 'uid' method: 'plain' # "ssl" or "plain" bind_dn: 'dc=harues,dc=com' password: 'gitlabldap'

Navigate to gitlab source directory and start the GitLab instance with:

bundle exec foreman start

If you now navigate to http://192.168.3.14:3000/ and fill in the sign in page under the LDAP section with:

username: euikookpassword: test

you will be authenticated with OpenLDAP server and logged into GitLab.

Logging

Activity logging for slapd is indispensible when implementing an OpenLDAP-based solution yet it must be manually enabled after software installation. Otherwise, only rudimentary messages will appear in the logs. Logging, like any other slapd configuration, is enabled via the slapd-config database.

OpenLDAP comes with multiple logging subsystems (levels) with each one containing the lower one (additive). A good level to try is stats. The slapd-config man page has more to say on the different subsystems.

Create the file logging.ldif with the following contents:

dn: cn=configchangetype: modifyreplace: olcLogLevelolcLogLevel: stats

Implement the change:

sudo ldapmodify -Q -Y EXTERNAL -H ldapi:/// -f logging.ldif

This will produce a significant amount of logging and you will want to throttle back to a less verbose level once your system is in production. While in this verbose mode your host’s syslog engine (rsyslog) may have a hard time keeping up and may drop messages:

rsyslogd-2177: imuxsock lost 228 messages from pid 2547 due to rate-limitingYou may consider a change to rsyslog’s configuration. In /etc/rsyslog.conf, put:

# Disable rate limiting# (default is 200 messages in 5 seconds; below we make the 5 become 0)$SystemLogRateLimitInterval 0

And then restart the rsyslog daemon:

sudo service rsyslog restart

LDAP TLS

When authenticating to an OpenLDAP server it is best to do so using an encrypted session. This can be accomplished using Transport Layer Security (TLS).

Here, we will be our own Certificate Authority and then create and sign our LDAP server certificate as that CA. Since slapd is compiled using the gnutls library, we will use the certtool utility to complete these tasks.

Install the gnutls-bin and ssl-cert packages:

sudo apt-get install gnutls-bin ssl-cert

Create a private key for the Certificate Authority:

sudo sh -c "certtool --generate-privkey > /etc/ssl/private/cakey.pem"

Create the template/file /etc/ssl/ca.info to define the CA:

cn = Netvision Telecom Inc.cacert_signing_key

Create the self-signed CA certificate:

sudo certtool --generate-self-signed \--load-privkey /etc/ssl/private/cakey.pem \ --template /etc/ssl/ca.info \--outfile /etc/ssl/certs/cacert.pem

Make a private key for the server:

sudo certtool --generate-privkey \--bits 1024 \--outfile /etc/ssl/private/ldap_slapd_key.pem

Replace ldap in the filename with your server’s hostname. Naming the certificate and key for the host and service that will be using them will help keep things clear.

Create the /etc/ssl/ldap.info info file containing:

organization = Example Companycn = ldap01.example.comtls_www_serverencryption_keysigning_keyexpiration_days = 3650

The above certificate is good for 10 years. Adjust accordingly.

Create the server’s certificate:

sudo certtool --generate-certificate \--load-privkey /etc/ssl/private/ldap_slapd_key.pem \--load-ca-certificate /etc/ssl/certs/cacert.pem \--load-ca-privkey /etc/ssl/private/cakey.pem \--template /etc/ssl/ldap01.info \--outfile /etc/ssl/certs/ldap_slapd_cert.pem

Create the file certinfo.ldif with the following contents (adjust accordingly, our example assumes we created certs using https://www.cacert.org):

dn: cn=configadd: olcTLSCACertificateFileolcTLSCACertificateFile: /etc/ssl/certs/cacert.pem-add: olcTLSCertificateFileolcTLSCertificateFile: /etc/ssl/certs/ldap_slapd_cert.pem-add: olcTLSCertificateKeyFileolcTLSCertificateKeyFile: /etc/ssl/private/ldap_slapd_key.pem

Use the ldapmodify command to tell slapd about our TLS work via the slapd-config database:

sudo ldapmodify -Y EXTERNAL -H ldapi:/// -f /etc/ssl/certinfo.ldif

Tighten up ownership and permissions:

sudo adduser openldap ssl-certsudo chgrp ssl-cert /etc/ssl/private/ldap_slapd_key.pemsudo chmod g+r /etc/ssl/private/ldap_slapd_key.pemsudo chmod o-r /etc/ssl/private/ldap_slapd_key.pem

Restart OpenLDAP:

sudo service slapd restart

Check your host’s logs (/var/log/syslog) to see if the server has started properly.

item.title: Instructions of post OS install
item.description:
OS мһ¬м„Өм№ҳ нӣ„ н•ҙм•ј н•ҳлҠ”кІғ л“Ө

OS мһ¬м„Өм№ҳ нӣ„ н•ҙм•ј н•ҳлҠ” лӮҙмҡ©л“Өмқ„ м •лҰ¬ н•ңлӢӨ.

нҢҢмқј ліөмӮ¬

rsyncлҘј мқҙмҡ©н•ңлӢӨ.

USBл“ұ мҷёл¶Җ л””мҠӨнҒ¬лҘј нҶөн•ң ліөмӮ¬

rsync -avzh $SRC $DST

л„ӨнҠёмӣҢнҒ¬(SSH)нҶөн•ң ліөмӮ¬.

мӢңк°„мқҙ мҳӨлһҳ кұёлҰ¬м§Җл§Ң нҺён•Ё.

rsync -avz -e ssh $REMOTE_HOST:/$$SRC $DST

Root к¶Ңн•ңмқҙ н•„мҡ”н•ң кІҪмҡ°

rsync -avz -e ssh --rsync-path='sudo ssh' $REMOTE_HOST:/$$SRC $DST

лҰ¬лӘЁнҠё мӢңмҠӨн…ңм—җ н•ҙлӢ№ мң м Җмқҳ sudo м„Өм •мқҙ NOPASSWDлЎң м„Өм •лҗҳм–ҙ мһҲм•„м•ј н•ңлӢӨ.

visudo
username ALL=NOPASSWD:/usr/bin/rsync

Application

Virtualbox

rsync -avzh $OLD_HOME/.config/VirtualBox $HOME/.config/VirtualBox

Insync

Stop Insync

мқҙлҜё InsyncлҘј мӢӨн–үн•ҳм—¬ м„Өм • нҢҢмқјмқҙ мғқм„ұлҗҳм–ҙ мһҲлӢӨл©ҙ нҢҢмқјмқ„ мӮӯм ңн•ңлӢӨ.

rm -rf $HOME/.config/Insync

нҢҢмқјмқ„ ліөмӮ¬н•ңлӢӨ.

rsync -avzh $OLD_HOME/.config/Insync $HOME/.config/Insync

item.title: Insync - Linuxм—җм„ң Google Drive Desktop Client мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкё°
item.description:
An AlternativeВ Google Drive Desktop Client for Linux

Insync - Linuxм—җм„ң Google Drive Desktop Client мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкё°

лҚ°мҠӨнҒ¬нғ‘мқ„ LinuxлЎң мҚЁмҳЁм§ҖлҸ„ лІҢмҚЁ 10л…„ к°Җк№Ңмқҙ лҗҳм–ҙ к°„лӢӨ. мІҳмқҢ лҚ°мҠӨнҒ¬нғ‘мқ„ LinuxлЎң ліҖкІҪн•ҳкі  л¶ҲнҺён–ҲлҚҳ мқён„°л„· лұ…нӮ№л“ұмқҳ л¬ём ңлҠ” мҠӨл§ҲнҠёнҸ°м—җм„ң мқҖн–ү м—…л¬ҙлҘј ліј мҲҳ мһҲкІҢ лҗҳл©ҙм„ң н•ҙкІ°лҗҳм—ҲлӢӨ. к·ёмҷё лҜјмӣҗм—…л¬ҙл“ұ л°ҳл“ңмӢң Windowsк°Җ н•„мҡ”н•ң мқјмқҖ VirtualBoxлҘј нҶөн•ҙ н•ҙкІ°н•ңлӢӨ.

к·ёмҷё м–ҙн”ҢлҰ¬мјҖмқҙм…ҳл“ӨмқҖ Linux AlternateлӮҳ google docs к°ҷмқҖ мӣ№ кё°л°ҳ м–ҙн”ҢлҰ¬мјҖмқҙм…ҳмңјлЎң лҢҖмІҙ к°ҖлҠҘн•ҳлӢӨ.В  н•ҳм§Җл§Ң лҚ°мқҙн„° л°ұм—… л°Ҹ кҙҖлҰ¬мҡ©мңјлЎң мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” Google DriveлҠ” мӢ лў°н•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” Alternateк°Җ м—Ҷм–ҙ кі лҜј н–Ҳн•ҳлҚҳ м°Ём—җ 3л…„м „ мҰҲмқҢм—җ insyncлқјлҠ” Applicationмқ„ м•ҢкІҢ лҗҳм—ҲлӢӨ мң лЈҢм§Җл§Ң мҡ”мҰҳ нҠёл ҢнҠёмқё м •кё° кІ°м ңк°Җ м•„лӢҢ one time кІ°м ңлЎң мӮ¬мҡ© к°ҖлҠҘн•ҳкі В к°Ғ л°°нҸ¬нҢҗмҡ© RepositoryлҸ„ лі„лҸ„лЎң м ңкіө н•ҳкё°л•Ңл¬ём—җ м„Өм№ҳ м—ӯмӢң к°„нҺён•ҳлӢӨ.В В headless applicationлҸ„ м§Җмӣҗ н•ҳкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ UI м—Ҷмқҙ мҪҳмҶ” мғҒм—җм„ң мӢӨн–үлҸ„ к°ҖлҠҘн•ҳлӢӨ. https://www.insynchq.com В  лӢӨлҘё Agentл“Өкіј л№„көҗн•ң мһҗлЈҢлҘј мӣҗн•ҳл©ҙ м•„лһҳ мӮ¬мқҙнҠёлҘј м°ёмЎ° н•ҳкё° л°”лһҖлӢӨ. https://itsfoss.com/use-google-drive-linux/

Insync м„Өм№ҳ

Add APT Repository

sudo apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys ACCAF35C

/etc/apt/sources.list.d/insync.list мқ„ мғқм„ұ н•ңлӢӨ. лӮҙмҡ©мқҖ лӢӨмқҢкіј к°ҷлӢӨ.

deb http://apt.insynchq.com/[DISTRIBUTION] [CODENAME] non-free contrib

Ubuntu 16.04 кІҪмқҳ [DISTRIBUTION] мқҖ ubuntu [CODENAME] мқҖ _xenial_мқ„ мһ…л Ҙн•ңлӢӨ.

echo deb http://apt.insynchq.com/ubuntu xenial non-free contrib | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/insync.list

Installation

sudo apt-get updateВ && sudo apt-get install insync

item.title: Insync 3.x auto start with xvfb and systemctl
item.description:
Insync 3.x auto start with xvfb and systemctl

Prerequisites

  • insync
  • xvfb

Systemctl script

xvfb

Create a file /home/euikook/.config/systemd/user/xvfb.service

[Unit]Description=X Virtual Frame Buffer ServiceAfter=network.target[Service]ExecStart=/usr/bin/Xvfb :99 -screen 0 1024x768x24[Install]WantedBy=default.target

Insync

Create a file /home/euikook/.config/systemd/user/insync.service

[Unit]Description=insync on start upAfter=xvfb.service[Service]Type=forkingEnvironment="DISPLAY=:99"ExecStart=/usr/bin/insync start[Install]WantedBy=default.target

Enable unit file

systemctl --user enable xvfb.servicesystemctl --user enable insync.service

Enable Lingering

loginctl enable-linger ${USER}loginctl show-user ${USER} | grep Linger

Post reboot

systemctl --user status xvfb.servicesystemctl --user status insync.serviceps ef |grep insync

item.title: Keep persistent SSH session using autossh and cron
item.description:
Keep persistent SSH session using autossh and cron

Background Knowledge

SSH Tunneling

  • Local Port Forwarding: used to forward a port from the client machine to the server machine.
  • Remote Port Forwarding:

Local Port Forwarding

ssh -L [bind_addr:]port:target_addr:target_port user@server
  • bind_addr
  • port
  • target_addr
  • target_port
  • user
  • server

Remote Port Forwarding

ssh -R [bind_addr:]port:target_addr:target_port user@server
  • bind_addr
  • port
  • target_addr
  • target_port
  • user
  • server

Please see http://dirk-loss.de/ssh-port-forwarding.pdf

Prerequisites

  • autossh
sudo apt-get install autossh

Server Side

Add User for SSH tunneling

sudo adduser --system --shell /bin/false --gecos "Auto SSH" --disabled-password --home=/home/autossh autossh

Generate SSH key

sudo -u autossh ssh-keygen -t rsa -b 4096 -f ~/.ssh/autossh

Copy public key to ~/.ssh/authorized_keys

sudo -u autossh cp ~/.ssh/autossh.pub ~/.ssh/authorized_keys

Append Follwing Configuration to /etc/ssh/sshd_config

Match User autossh #AllowTcpForwarding yes #X11Forwarding no #PermitTunnel no #GatewayPorts no AllowAgentForwarding no PermitOpen localhost:2222 ForceCommand echo 'This account can only be used for [reason]'

if did you want Local Port Forwarding please set GatewayPorts to yes.

Match User autossh ... GatewayPorts no ...

Restart SSH daemon

sudo systemctl restart ssh

Client Side

Copy SSH private key to client host

scp 1.2.3.4/.ssh/autossh ~/.ssh/autossh

Install autossh

sudo apt install autossh

Add SSH Client Configurations

Append following config to ~/.ssh/config

Replace 1.2.3.4 to real IP or hostname

for Local Forwarding

only allowed if GatewayPort=yes (default: no) in server configuration.

Host 1.2.3.4 autossh Hostname 1.2.3.4 User autossh SendEnv LANG LC_* IdentityFile ~/.ssh/autossh ConnectTimeout 0 HashKnownHosts yes GSSAPIAuthentication yes GSSAPIDelegateCredentials no LocalForward 2222 localhost:22 ServerAliveInterval 30 ServerAliveCountMax 3
LocalForward 2222 localhost:22

for Remote Forwarding

Host 1.2.3.4 autossh Hostname 1.2.3.4 User autossh SendEnv LANG LC_* IdentityFile ~/.ssh/autossh ConnectTimeout 0 HashKnownHosts yes GSSAPIAuthentication yes GSSAPIDelegateCredentials no RemoteForward 2222 localhost:22 ServerAliveInterval 30 ServerAliveCountMax 3
RemoteForward** 2222 localhost:22

Test SSH connection

autossh -M 0 -f -N autossh

Verify SSH Connection

Check listen port in your system.

for Local Port Forward (in Server)

netstat -lnt

for Remote Port Forward (in Client)

netstat -lnt
ps aux |grep autossh

Copy autossh-bot to ~/bin

mkdir -p ~/bincp ./bin/auto-ssh-bot ~/bin

Register cron job

crontab -e

Schedule cron job to every 5 minutes

0/5 * * * * ~/bin/auto-ssh-bot

item.title: Let use zsh
item.description:
Let use zsh

.zshrc

ZSH=/usr/share/oh-my-zsh/ZSH_THEME="agnoster"DISABLE_AUTO_UPDATE="true"plugins=(git virtualenv)ZSH_CACHE_DIR=$HOME/.cache/oh-my-zshif [[ ! -d $ZSH_CACHE_DIR ]]; then mkdir $ZSH_CACHE_DIRfisource $ZSH/oh-my-zsh.shsource /usr/share/zsh/plugins/zsh-syntax-highlighting/zsh-syntax-highlighting.zshsource /usr/share/nvm/init-nvm.shprompt_context() { if [[ "$USER" != "$DEFAULT_USER" || -n "$SSH_CLIENT" ]]; then CONTEXT="%(!.%{%F{yellow}%}.)%n" if [[ -n "$SSH_CLIENT" ]]; then CONTEXT="${CONTEXT}@%m" #prompt_segment black default "%(!.%{%F{yellow}%}.)%n@%m" fi prompt_segment black default ${CONTEXT} fi}[[ -s "$HOME/.rvm/scripts/rvm" ]] && source "$HOME/.rvm/scripts/rvm" # Load RVM into a shell session *as a function*# Add RVM to PATH for scripting. Make sure this is the last PATH variable change.export PATH="$PATH:$HOME/.rvm/bin"

item.title: Pacman Cheatsheet
item.description:
Pacman Cheatsheet

CommandParamsDescription
pacman -Syu<pkg>Sync package list and install <pkg>.
pacman -S<pkg>Install <pkg> only.
pacman -Rsc<pkg>Uninstall <pkg>.
pacman -Ss<keyowrd>Search <keyword>.
pacman -SyuN/ASync package list and update available packages.

Query(Q) Commands

CommandParamsDescription
pacman -QN/AList all installed packages with version
pacman -QqN/AList all installed packages without version
pacman -QeN/AList explictly installed packages with version
pacman -QqeN/AList explictly installed packages without version
pacman -Ql<pkg>List all files owned by a given <pkg>
pacman -Qi<pkg>Display information on a given <pkg>
pacman -Qii<pkg>Display information on a given <pkg> (more than single i)
pacman -Qs<keyword>Search each locally-installed package for names or descriptions that match regexp

item.title: Python3 ad default python interpreter on ubuntu
item.description:
Python кё°ліё мқён„°н”„лҰ¬н„° м„Өм • н•ҳкё°

sudo update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/pip pip /usr/bin/pip3 10sudo update-alternatives --install /usr/bin/python python /usr/bin/python3 10sudo update-alternatives --config pipsudo update-alternatives --config python

м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ м§Ғм ‘ --set мҳөм…ҳмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ м„Өм • н•ңлӢӨ.

item.title: RPi(Raspberry Pi) Username ліҖкІҪн•ҳкё°
item.description:
RPi(Raspberry Pi) Username ліҖкІҪн•ҳкё°

How to change default account username for RPi(Raspberry Pi)

Raspberry Pi кіөмӢқ мқҙлҜём§Җмқҳ username кіј passwordлҠ” лӢӨмқҢкіј к°ҷлӢӨ.

username: pi
password : raspberry

м“ёл•Ңл§ҲлӢӨ лҠҗлҒјлҠ” кұ°м§Җл§Ң pi мҷҖ raspberryлҠ” м •л§җ мҶҗм—җ мқөм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ. нӮӨліҙл“ңлЎң м№ л•Ңл§ҲлӢӨ мҳӨнғҖк°Җ лӮҳм„ң н•ңлІҲм—җ лЎңк·ёмқё н• л•Ңк°Җ кұ°мқҳ м—ҶлӢӨ. pi кі„м •мқ„ кі„мҶҚ м“°л©ҙ ліҙм•Ҳ л¬ём ңлҸ„ мғқкёё мҲҳ мһҲмңјлӢҲ мһҗмӢ л§Ңмқҳ мҶҗм—җ мқөмқҖ usernameкіј passwordлЎң ліҖкІҪ н•ҙ ліҙмһҗ.

лЁјм Җ root кі„м •мңјлЎң лЎңк·ёмқё н•ҙм•ј н•ңлӢӨ. лЁјм Җ root лЎң лЎңк·ёмқё н•ҳкё° мң„н•ҳм—¬ root кі„м •мқҳ PasswordлҘј м„Өм •н•ңлӢӨ.

sudo passwd root

pi кі„м • м—җм„ң лЎңк·ём•„мӣғ нӣ„ root кі„м •мңјлЎң лЎңк·ёмқё н•ңлӢӨ.

logout

pi кі„м •мқ„ haruesлЎң ліҖкІҪн•ңлӢӨ.

usermod -l harues pi

мқҙм ң /home/pi л””л үн„°лҰ¬лҘј /home/haruesлЎң ліҖкІҪн•ҳмһҗ.

usermod -m -d /home/harues harues

н•„мҡ”н•ҳлӢӨл©ҙ ліҖкІҪн•ң haruesкі„м •мқҳ PasswordлҘј ліҖкІҪн•ңлӢӨ.

passwd harues

н•„мҡ” н•ҳлӢӨл©ҙ pi groupлҸ„ ліҖкІҪ н•ңлӢӨ.

groupmod -n harues pi

root кі„м •м—җм„ң лЎңк·ё м•„мӣғ нӣ„ haruesмңјлЎң лЎңк·ёмқё н•ңлӢӨ.

root кі„м •мқ„ л№„нҷңм„ұнҷ” н•ҳкё°м „ sudo лӘ…л №мқҙ мһҳ лҸҷмһ‘ н•ҳлҠ”м§Җ нҷ•мқён•ңлӢӨ.

sudo ls

passwordлҘј Lock н•ҳм—¬ root кі„м •мқ„ л№„нҷңм„ұнҷ” н•ңлӢӨ.

sudo passwd -l root

item.title: RSYNC+SSH лҘј мқҙмҡ©н•ң мҰқл¶„ л°ұм—… м„Өм • л°Ҹ Cronмқ„ мқҙмҡ©н•ң мһҗлҸҷнҷ”
item.description:
Incremental Backup Using RSYNC+SSH and cron

RSYNC+SSH лҘј мқҙмҡ©н•ң мҰқл¶„ л°ұм—… м„Өм • л°Ҹ Cronмқ„ мқҙмҡ©н•ң мһҗлҸҷнҷ”

кҙҖлҰ¬ н•ҳлҠ” м„ңлІ„к°Җ л§Һм•„м§Җкі  м„ңлІ„м—җ м ҖмһҘлҗҳлҠ” лҚ°мқҙн„°мқҳ м–‘мқҙ лҠҳм–ҙ лӮ  мҲҳлЎқ л°ұм—…мқ„ м–ҙл–»кІҢ н•ҳм—¬м•ј н•ҳлҠ”м§Җ кі лҜјмқҙ мғқкёҙлӢӨ. мқҙ нҸ¬мҠӨнҠём—җм„ңлҠ” RSYNCмҷҖ SSHлҘј мқҙмҡ©н•ҳм—¬ м—¬лҹ¬ м„ңлІ„мқҳ лҚ°мқҙн„°лҘј л°ұм—…н•ҳкі  мқҙлҘј мһҗлҸҷнҷ” н•ҳлҠ” л°©лІ•м—җ лҢҖн•ҳм—¬ кё°мҲ  н•ңлӢӨ. н…ҢмҠӨнҠёлҘј мң„н•ң м„ңлІ„ кө¬м„ұмқҖ лӢӨмқҢкіј к°ҷлӢӨ. В  В  м•„лһҳ мҳҲм ң м—җм„ңлҠ” S-01, S-02, _S-03_мқҳ /home л””л үн„°лҰ¬лҘј BackupBotмңјлЎң л°ұм—… н•ҳкі мһҗ н•ңлӢӨ.

кіөнҶө мӨҖл№„ мӮ¬н•ӯ

Backup User мғқм„ұ

л°ұм—…мқ„ мң„н•ң мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗ кі„м •мқ„ мғқм„ұн•ңлӢӨ.

sudo adduser --disabled-password --gecos 'BackupMan' backupman

SSH нӮӨ мғқм„ұ л°Ҹ л°°нҸ¬

SSH KEY мғқм„ұ (BackupBot)

ssh-keygen лӘ…л №мңјлЎң SSH KEYлҘј мғқм„ұн•ңлӢӨ.

ssh-keygen -t rsa -b 4096 -f backupman -C BackupMan

SSH KEY л°°нҸ¬

private нӮӨлҘјВ  м•һм„ң мғқм„ұн•ң backupman кі„м • мңјлЎң ліөмӮ¬н•ңлӢӨ.

sudo mv backupman ~backupman/.ssh/backupmansudo chown backupman:backupman ~backupman/.ssh/backupman

each м„ңлІ„лЎң ssh publicВ  keyлҘј л°°нҸ¬н•ңлӢӨ.

scp ~/backupman.pub 172.18.18.100:authorized_keysscp ~/backupman.pub 172.18.18.101:authorized_keysscp ~/backupman.pub 172.18.18.102:authorized_keys

SSH public key м„Өм№ҳ

к°Ғ м„ңлІ„м—җ м ‘мҶҚ н•ҳм—¬В  м•һм„ң ліөмӮ¬н•ң SSH public KEYлҘј backupman кі„м •м—җ ліөмӮ¬н•ңлӢӨ.

sudo mv authorized_keys ~backupman/.ssh/authorized_keyssudo chown backupman:backupman ~backupman/.ssh/authorized_keyssudo chmod 600 ~backupman/.ssh/authorized_keys

м„ңлІ„ м„Өм •

л°ұм—… н•ҳкі мһҗ н•ҳлҠ” м„ңлІ„м—җ м ‘мҶҚ н•ҳм—¬ лӢӨмқҢкіј к°ҷмқҙ м„Өм • н•ңлӢӨ.

н•„мҡ” нҢЁнӮӨм§Җ м„Өм№ҳ

sudo apt-get install -y rsync

к¶Ңн•ң м„Өм •

/etc/sudoers нҢҢмқјмқ„ м—ҙм–ҙ к¶Ңн•ңмқ„ м„Өм • н•ңлӢӨ.

sudo visudo

м•„лһҳ лӮҙмҡ©мқ„ м¶”к°Җ

backupman ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD: /usr/bin/rsync --server --sender -vlogDtprze.iLsfx --numeric-ids . /*

BackupBot м„Өм •

н•„мҡ” нҢЁнӮӨм§Җ м„Өм№ҳ

sudo apt-get install -y rsyncВ uuid

Backup мҠӨнҒ¬лҰҪнҠё м„Өм№ҳ

sudo -H pip install git+https://github.com/harues/python-backupman.git@masterbackupman --version

к¶Ңн•ң м„Өм •

/etc/sudoers нҢҢмқјмқ„ м—ҙм–ҙ к¶Ңн•ңмқ„ м„Өм • н•ңлӢӨ.

sudo visudo

м•„лһҳ лӮҙмҡ©мқ„ м¶”к°Җн•ңлӢӨ.

backupman ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD: /usr/local/bin/backupman

SSH Client м„Өм •

~/.ssh/config нҢҢмқјмқ„ м—ҙм–ҙ

sudo -u backupman -H vi ~backupman/.ssh/config

лӢӨмқҢкіј к°ҷмқҙ м„Өм •н•ңлӢӨ. (н•ҙлӢ№ нҢҢмқјмқҙ м—Ҷмқ„ кІҪмҡ° мғқм„ұн•ңлӢӨ.)

Host S-01-BACKUPHostname 172.18.18.100User backupmanPort 22SendEnv LANG LC_*IdentityFile ~/.ssh/backupmanConnectTimeout 0HashKnownHosts yesGSSAPIAuthentication yesGSSAPIDelegateCredentials noHost S-02-BACKUPHostname 172.18.18.101User backupmanPort 22SendEnv LANG LC_*IdentityFile ~/.ssh/backupmanConnectTimeout 0HashKnownHosts yesGSSAPIAuthentication yesGSSAPIDelegateCredentials noHost S-03-BACKUPHostname 172.18.18.102User backupmanPort 22SendEnv LANG LC_*IdentityFile ~/.ssh/backupmanConnectTimeout 0HashKnownHosts yesGSSAPIAuthentication yesGSSAPIDelegateCredentials no

SSH Client м ‘мҶҚ нҷ•мқё

лӢӨмқҢ лӘ…л №мңјлЎң л°°нҸ¬лҗң KEYлЎң SSHм ‘мҶҚмқҙ м •мғҒм ҒмңјлЎң лҗҳлҠ”м§Җ нҷ•мқён•ңлӢӨ.(PasswordлҘј л¬јм–ҙ ліҙм§Җ м•Ҡмңјл©ҙ м„ұкіө.)

sudo -u backupman -H ssh S-01-BACKUP
sudo -u backupman -H ssh S-02-BACKUP
sudo -u backupman -H ssh S-03-BACKUP

л°ұм—… н…ҢмҠӨнҠё

л°ұм—…н…ҢмҠӨнҠёлҘј мң„н•ҙ backupman кі„м •мңјлЎң лЎңк·ёмқё н•ңлӢӨ.

sudo -u backupman -i

лӢӨмқҢ лӘ…л №мқ„ нҶөн•ҙ л°ұм—… мҠӨнҒ¬лҰҪнҠёк°Җ м •мғҒм ҒмңјлЎң лҸҷмһ‘ н•ҳлҠ”м§Җ нҷ•мқён•ңлӢӨ.

S-01

sudo backupman -i -r ssh://S-01-BACKUP/home /home/backupman/S-01

S-02

sudo backupman -i -r ssh://S-02-BACKUP/home /home/backupman/S-02

S-03

sudo backupman -i -r ssh://S-03-BACKUP/home /home/backupman/S-03

Cronм—җ Task л“ұлЎқ

мң„ лӘ…л №мқҙ м •мғҒм ҒмңјлЎң мҲҳн–үлҗҳм–ҙ л°ұм—…мқҙ мҷ„лЈҢ лҗҳм—Ҳмңјл©ҙ cronм—җ л“ұлЎқ н•ҳм—¬ мЈјкё°м ҒмңјлЎң л°ұм—…мқҙ мқҙлЈЁм–ҙ м§ҖлҸ„лЎқ н•ңлӢӨ.

sudo -u backupman -H crontab -e

лӢӨмқҢ лӘ…л №мқ„ 03, 04, 05мӢңм—җ к°Ғк°Ғ S-01, S-02, _S-03_м—җлҢҖн•ң л°ұм—…мқ„ мҲҳн–ү н•ҳлҸ„лЎқ jobмқ„ л“ұлЎқн•ң мҳҲм ң мқҙлӢӨ.

0 3 * * * sudo /usr/local/bin/backupman -i -r ssh://S-01-BACKUP/home /home/backupman/S-010 4 * * * sudo /usr/local/bin/backupman -i -r ssh://S-02-BACKUP/home /home/backupman/S-020 5 * * * sudo /usr/local/bin/backupman -i -r ssh://S-03-BACKUP/home /home /home/backupman/S-03

Backup мҠӨнҒ¬лҰҪнҠёлҠ” м•„лһҳ Repositoryм—җм„ң нҷ•мқё н•  мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ. https://github.com/harues/python-backupman

item.title: Run Gitlab Runner in a container
item.description:
Run Gitlab Runner in a container

Prerequisites

  • Docker
  • Docker Compose

Usages

Clone Repository

git clone https://gitlab.com/euikook/gitlab-runner-compose.git

Configuration

  • Replace CI_SERVER_URL value with your Gitlab server e.g. https://gitlab.com
  • Obtain a token for a shared or specific Runner via GitLabвҖҷs interface and replace REGISTRATION_TOKEN value
tee .env << ENDCI_SERVER_URL=https://gitlab.com/REGISTRATION_TOKEN=zDsz34JuZf95NoBaQPXEND

Registration and run gitlab-runner

docker-compose up -d

References

  • https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/runners/
  • https://docs.gitlab.com/runner/install/docker.html
  • https://dev.to/imichael/this-one-trick-gives-you-unlimited-ci-minutes-on-gitlab-e92

item.title: Shrink dynamically extended VirtualBox image for export appliance
item.description:
Shrink dynamically extended VirtualBox image for export appliance

Cleanup your system System

Cleanup APT cache

sudo apt-get cleansudo rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

Cleanup docker cache (Optional, if you need)

docker system prune -a -f

Uninstall snap (Optional, if you need)

sudo apt-get autoremove --purge snapd

Cleanup Logs (Optional, if you need)

for f in $(find /var/log -type f); do sudo cat /dev/null > $f; echo " Log $f has been cleared";done

Shutdown system and boot using ubuntu installation image.

After finish boot. Just press ALT+F2 switch to virtual terminal #2 end press Enter.

Set to zero free block using zerofree command.

sudo zerofree /dev/sda2

and shutdown your system

sudo shutdown -h now

Export Virtual Machine

Using export wizard.

command line interface

Check virtual machine name using vboxmanage list vms

vboxmanage list vms
vboxmanage export $VM_NAME -o $IMG_NAME

Replace $VM_NAME with virtual machine name did you want to export.

Replcae $IMG_NAME to output file name did you want. e.g. ubuntu-bionic-server.ova

item.title: Shrink dynamically extended VirtualBox image for export appliance
item.description:
Shrink dynamically allocated VirtualBox Disk Image(VDI)

Motivation

м—…л¬ҙм—җ VirtualBoxмқ„ мһҗмЈј нҷңмҡ©н•ңлӢӨ.

к°ңл°ң нҷҳкІҪл“ұмқ„ мӢңмҠӨн…ңм—җ м„Өм№ҳ н•ҳкё° нһҳл“Өл•Ң VirtualBoxлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ к°ңл°ңнҷҳкІҪмқ„ кө¬м¶• н•ҳкұ°лӮҳ кІ°кіјл¬јмқ„ м„Өм№ҳ н•ҳм—¬ н…ҢмҠӨнҠёмҡ©мңјлЎң л°°нҸ¬н•ңлӢӨ.

м—¬лҹ¬лҢҖмқҳ лЁёмӢ мқҙ н•„мҡ”н•ҳм§Җл§Ң AWSлӮҳ GCPлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкё° нһҳл“Өл•Ң мң мҡ©н•ң лҢҖм•Ҳмқҙ л°”лЎң VirtualBoxмқҙлӢӨ.

Virtualbox к°ҖмғҒлЁёмӢ мқҳ л””мҠӨнҒ¬лҘј лҸҷм Ғ н• лӢ№ л””мҠӨнҒ¬лЎң мғқм„ұ н•ҳмҳҖмқ„ кІҪмҡ° кІҪмҡ° нҷҳкІҪ м„Өм№ҳ нӣ„ л¶Ҳн•„мҡ”н•ң нҢҢмқјмқ„ мӮӯм ң н•ҳлҚ”лқјлҸ„ л””мҠӨнҒ¬мқҳ нҒ¬кё°к°Җ мӨ„м–ҙл“Өм§Җ м•Ҡкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ лӮҙліҙлӮҙкё° н•ң мқҙлҜём§ҖлҸ„ к°ҷмқҙ м»Өм§„лӢӨ.

нҳјмһҗл§Ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•  л•ҢлҠ” л””мҠӨнҒ¬ мҡ©лҹүл§Ң м°Ём§Җн•  лҝҗ м•„л¬ҙ л¬ём ңк°Җ м—Ҷм§Җл§Ң к°ҖмғҒлЁёмӢ мқ„ л°°нҸ¬ н•ҙм•ј н•ҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ°к°Җ лҗҳл©ҙ мқҙлҜём§Җмқҳ мӮ¬мқҙмҰҲк°Җ л„Ҳл¬ҙ м»Өм„ң л°°нҸ¬н•ҳкё° л¶ҖлӢҙмҠӨлҹ¬мӣҢ м§„лӢӨ.

мң„мҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ кІҪмҡ°м—җ нҡЁмңЁм Ғмқё л°°нҸ¬лҘј мң„н•ң лҸҷм Ғ н• лӢ№ л””мҠӨнҒ¬мқҳ мқҙлҜём§Җ мӮ¬мқҙмҰҲлҘј мӨ„мқҙлҠ” л°©лІ•мқ„ мҶҢк°ң н•ңлӢӨ.

vboxmanage modifymedium --compact лӘ…л №мқ„ мқҙмҡ©н•ҳм—¬ VDI мқҙлҜём§Җ мӮ¬мқҙмҰҲлҘј мӨ„мқј мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ. --compact мҳөм…ҳм—җ лҢҖн•ң м„ӨлӘ…мқҖ лӢӨмңјкіј к°ҷлӢӨ.

The --compact option can be used to compact disk images. Compacting removes blocks that only contains zeroes. Using this option will shrink a dynamically allocated image. It will reduce the physical size of the image without affecting the logical size of the virtual disk. Compaction works both for base images and for differencing images created as part of a snapshot.

мһҗм„ён•ң лӮҙмҡ©мқҖ м—¬кё°лҘј м°ёкі .

н•ҳм§Җл§Ң мң„мқҳ м„ӨлӘ…кіј к°ҷмқҙ --compact мҳөм…ҳмқҖ VDI нҢҢмқјм—җм„ң л№Ҳ лё”лҹӯ(only contains zero)л§Ңмқ„ м°ҫм•„ м ңкұ°н•ҙмЈјлҠ” мҳөм…ҳмқҙлӢӨ.

лҰ¬лҲ…мҠӨ мӢңмҠӨн…ңм—җм„ң rm лӘ…л №мңјлЎң нҢҢмқјмқ„ мӮӯм ңн•ҳлҚ”лқјлҸ„ н•ҙлӢ№ лё”лҹӯмқҙ мӢӨм ңлЎң zeroing лҗҳлҠ” кІғмқҙ м•„лӢҲкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ лӘ…л №мқ„ мӢӨн–үм „ м„Өм№ҳлҗң мҡҙмҳҒмІҙм ңлӮҳ нҢҢмқјмӢңмҠӨн…ңм—җ л§һлҠ” л°©лІ•мңјлЎң л№„м–ҙ мһҲлҠ” лё”лҹӯмқ„ zeroing н•ҙмЈјм–ҙм•ј н•ңлӢӨ. (нҢҢмқј мӢңмҠӨн…ңмқҙ extNмқё кІҪмҡ° zerofree лӘ…л №мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ zeroingмқ„ н•ңлӢӨ.

Cleanup your system System (Optional)

л¶Ҳн•„мҡ”н•ң нҢҢмқјмқ„ мӮӯм ң н•ҳмһҗ. (н•„мҡ”н•ң кІҪмҡ°м—җл§Ң мҲҳн–үн•ңлӢӨ.)

Cleanup APT cache

sudo apt-get cleansudo rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

Cleanup docker cache

лҸ„м»ӨлҘј мӮ¬мҡ© н•ҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ° н…ҢмҠӨнҠёлҘј мң„н•ҙ м—¬лҹ¬ мқҙлҜём§ҖлҘј лӢ№кІЁл°ӣм•„ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё н•ҳлӢӨ ліҙл©ҙ кҪӨл§ҺмқҖ мҡ©лҹүмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳкІҢ лҗңлӢӨ.

лӘЁл‘җ мӮӯм ңн•ҳкі 

docker system prune -a -f

н•„мҡ”н•ң мқҙлҜём§Җл§Ң лӢӨмӢң лӢ№кІЁл°ӣмһҗ.

docker pull mongo:4

Uninstall snap package.

мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡмқ„ кІҪмҡ° мӮӯм ң н•ҳмһҗ.

sudo apt-get autoremove --purge snapd

Cleanup /var/log

мӢңмҠӨн…ңмқ„ мҳӨлһҳ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳмҳҖмқ„ кІҪмҡ° кҪӨ л§ҺмқҖ лЎңк·ёк°Җ мҢ“м—¬ мһҲлӢӨ. мӮӯм ңн• кІҪмҡ° лҸҷмһ‘мӨ‘мқё н”„лЎңк·ёлһЁм—җ л¬ём ңк°Җ мғқкёёмҲҳлҸ„ мһҲмңјлӢҲ л№Ҳ нҢҢмқјлЎң л§Ңл“ лӢӨ.

for f in $(find /var/log -type f); dosudo cat /dev/null > $f;echo " Log $f has been cleared";done

м •лҰ¬лҘј л§ҲміӨмңјл©ҙ мӢңмҠӨн…ңмқ„ лҒҲлӢӨ.

sudo shutdown -h now

Zeroing Free Blocks

zerofree лӘ…л №мңјлЎң л№Ҳ лё”лҹӯмқ„ zeroing н•ҳкё° мң„н•ҙм„ңлҠ” Root Filesystemмқ„ Readonly ModeлЎң л§ҲмҡҙнҢ… н•ҙм•ј н•ҳм§Җл§Ң л¶ҖнҢ… мғҒнғңм—җм„ңлҠ” мһҳ лҗҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ.

$ sudo mount -o remount,ro /mount: /: mount point is busy.

м—¬лҹ¬ л°©лІ•мқҙ мһҲм§Җл§Ң к°ҖмһҘ к°„лӢЁн•ң Ubuntu м„Өм№ҳ мқҙлҜём§ҖлЎң л¶ҖнҢ…н•ң н•ң нӣ„ zerofree лӘ…л №мңјлЎң Free Blockмқ„ Zeroing н•ҳмһҗ.

Ubuntu 18.04.2 Server Live мқҙлҜём§ҖлҘј мқҙмҡ©н•ҳмҳҖлӢӨ. (мқҙлҜём§Җм—җ zerofree лӘ…л №мқҙ нҸ¬н•Ёлҗҳм–ҙ мһҲлӢӨ.)

л¶ҖнҢ…мқҙ мҷ„лЈҢлҗңнӣ„ лӢӨмқҢ кіј к°ҷмқҖ нҷ”л©ҙмқҙ лӮҳмҳӨл©ҙ

лңЁл©ҙ ALT+F2 нӮӨлҘј лҲҢлҹ¬ н„°лҜёл„җмқ„ мӢӨн–ү мӢңнӮЁлӢӨ.

zerofree лӘ…л №мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ л№Ҳ лё”лҹӯмқ„ м ңлЎңмһү н•ңлӢӨ.

sudo zerofree /dev/sda2

мҷ„лЈҢлҗҳл©ҙ мӢңмҠӨн…ң мў…лЈҢн•ңлӢӨ.

sudo shutdown -h now

Compact the VDI file.

vboxmanage modifymedium --compact лӘ…л №мқ„ мқҙмҡ©н•ҳм—¬ VDI мқҙлҜём§Җ мӮ¬мқҙмҰҲлҘј мӨ„мқёлӢӨ.

л””мҠӨнҒ¬ нҢҢмқјмқҳ мң„м№ҳлҘј нҷ•мқён•ҳмһҗ

vboxmanage showvminfo ubuntu-bionic-server |grep vdi

м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ кІ°кіјлҘј м–»мқ„ мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.

SATA (0, 0): /home/harues/VMs/ubuntu-bionic-server.vdi (UUID: ********-****-****-****-************)

--compact мҳөм…ҳмңјлЎң VDI нҢҢмқјмқҳ мӮ¬мқҙмҰҲлҘј мӨ„мқёлӢӨ.

vboxmanage modifymedium "/home/harues/VMs/ubuntu-bionic-server.vdi" --compact

Export Virtual Machine

Using export wizard.

Using Command Line Interface

vboxmanage list vms лӘ…л №мңјлЎң лӮҙліҙлӮј к°ҖмғҒлЁёмӢ мқҳ мқҙлҜём§ҖлҘј нҷ•мқён•ңлӢӨ.

vboxmanage list vms

vboxmanage export лӘ…л №мңјлЎң VM мқ„ лӮҙ ліҙлӮёлӢӨ.

vboxmanage export $VM_NAME -o $IMG_NAME

  • $VM_NAME мқҖ лӮҙліҙлӮҙкі мһҗ н•ҳлҠ” к°ҖмғҒлЁёмӢ мқҳ мқҙлҰ„мңјлЎң лҢҖмІҙ н•ңлӢӨ. (мҳҲ: ubuntu-bionic-server)

  • $IMG_NAME мқҖ мғқм„ұлҗ  мқҙлҜём§Җмқҳ мқҙлҰ„мңјлЎң лҢҖмІҙн•ңлӢӨ. (мҳҲ: ubuntu-bionic-server.ova)

vboxmanage export мқҳ мһҗм„ён•ң мӮ¬мҡ©лІ•мқҖ м•„лһҳ лӘ…л №мқ„ м°ёкі н•ҳмһҗ

vboxmanage export --help

лӢӨмқҢкіј к°ҷмқҙ мғқм„ұлҗ  мқҙлҜём§Җ нҢҢмқјм—җ л©”нғҖлҚ°мқҙн„°лҘј м¶”к°Җ н• мҲҳлҸ„ мһҲлӢӨ.

vboxmanage export ubuntu-bionic-server \ --output ubuntu-bionic-server.ova \ --vsys 0 \ --product "Ubuntu Clean Image" \ --producturl "https://harues.com/posts/" \ --vendor "Harues.com" \ --vendorurl "https://harues.com" \ --version "1.0.0" \ --description "Ubuntu Bionic Server Clean Installation"

item.title: SSH config with Include
item.description:
SSH Config with Include

OpenSSH 7.3м—җм„ң Include кё°лҠҘмқҙ м¶”к°Җ лҗҳм—ҲлӢӨ.

About ~/.ssh/config

SSH м ‘мҶҚ м •ліҙлҘј ~/.ssh/config нҢҢмқјм—җ м ҖмһҘн•ңлӢӨ.

м ‘мҶҚн•ҳкі мһҗ н•ҳлҠ” SSH м„ңлІ„мқҳ м—°кІ° мҳөм…ҳмқ„ лӢ¬лҰ¬ н•ҙм•ј лҗҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ°лӮҳ IPлҘј мҷёмҡё н•„мҡ” м—Ҷмқҙ м§Җм •н•ң м„ңлІ„ мқҙлҰ„мңјлЎң м ‘мҶҚн•  мҲҳ мһҲкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ л§Өмҡ° мң мҡ©н•ҳлӢӨ.

лҳҗн•ң ліҙм•Ҳл“ұмқҳ мқҙмң лӮҳ NATлӮҙл¶Җмқҳ Port Forwardingлҗң мҷёмҡ°кё° нһҳл“  SSH Port мЈјмҶҢлЎң м ‘мҶҚ н•ҙм•ј н•ңлӢӨл©ҙ м•„лһҳ мҳҲм ңмқҳ Port нҢҢлқјлҜён„°лҘј м •н•ҳкё°л§Ң н•ҳл©ҙ лҗңлӢӨ.

м•„лһҳлҠ” ~/ssh/config нҢҢмқјмқҳ мҳҲм ң мқҙлӢӨ.

Host 1.2.3.4 test Hostname 1.2.3.4 Port 22 User username SendEnv LANG LC_* IdentityFile ~/.ssh/test ConnectTimeout 0 HashKnownHosts yes GSSAPIAuthentication yes GSSAPIDelegateCredentials no ServerAliveInterval 30 ServerAliveCountMax 3

м ‘мҶҚн•ҳкі мһҗ н•ҳлҠ” IP 1.2.3.4м—җ Domain Nameмқҙ н• лӢ№лҗҳм–ҙ мһҲм§Җ м•Ҡкұ°лӮҳ н•ҙлӢ№ IP м •ліҙк°Җ /etc/hostsм—җ м§Җм •лҗҳм–ҙ мһҲм§Җ м•ҠлҚ”лқјлҸ„ нҳёмҠӨнҠё м§Җм •мһҗлЎң test м§Җм •н•ҳм—¬ м ‘мҶҚн•  мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.

ssh test

Include statement

мқҙкІҢ л¬ём ңк°Җ лҗҳлҠ”кІҢ л„Ҳл¬ҙ кҙҖлҰ¬н•ҙм•јлҗ  SSHм„ңлІ„мқҳ мҲҳк°Җ л§Һм•„м§Җл©ҙ ~/.ssh/config нҢҢмқјмқҙ л„Ҳл¬ҙ м»Өм ё лІ„л Өм„ң кҙҖлҰ¬к°Җ нһҳл“ӨкІҢ лҗңлӢӨ. н•ҙлӢ№ м„Өм • нҢҢмқјмқ„ л¶„н•  н•ҳл©ҙ мўӢкІ м§Җл§Ң OpenSSH 7.3 мқҙм „ лІ„м јм—җм„ңлҠ” Include кё°лҠҘмқ„ м§Җмӣҗн•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡм•ҳкё° л•Ңл¶„м—җ л¶Ҳк°ҖлҠҘ н–ҲлӢӨ. н•ҳм§Җл§Ң мқҙм ңлҠ” к°ҖлҠҘн•ҳлӢӨ.

лЁјм Җ м„Өм№ҳлҗң OpenSSH нҢЁнӮӨм§Җмқҳ лІ„м јмқ„ нҷ•мқён•ңлӢӨ.

ssh -V

лӮҙк°Җ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳлҠ” мӢңмҠӨн…ңмқҳ кІҪмҡ° 8.4p1мқҙлӢӨ.

$ lsb_release -aLSB Version:1.4Distributor ID:ArchDescription:Arch LinuxRelease:rollingCodename:n/a$ ssh -VOpenSSH_8.4p1, OpenSSL 1.1.1h 22 Sep 2020

Ubuntu 18.04 мқҳ кІҪмҡ° 7.6p1 мқҙлЎң нҷ•мқёлҗҳм—ҲлӢӨ.

$ lsb_release -aNo LSB modules are available.Distributor ID:UbuntuDescription:Ubuntu 18.04.5 LTSRelease:18.04Codename:bionic$ ssh -VOpenSSH_7.6p1 Ubuntu-4ubuntu0.3, OpenSSL 1.0.2n 7 Dec 2017

SSH Clientк°Җ 7.4 мқҙм „ лІ„м „мқҙкұ°лӮҳ OpenSSH к°Җ м•„лӢҲлқјл©ҙ 7.4 мқҙмғҒмқҳ OpenSSH нҢЁнӮӨм§ҖлҘј м„Өм№ҳ н•ңлӢӨ.

Split config file

~/.ssh/config нҢҢмқјмқ„ л¶„н• н•ңлӢӨ.

лӮҳмқҳ кІҪмҡ° м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ conf.d лқјлҠ” л””л үн„°лҰ¬лҘј л§Ңл“Өкі  н•ҙлӢ№ л””л үн„°лҰ¬м—җ н”„лЎңм қнҠёлі„лЎң м„ңлІ„л“Өмқ„ л¶„лҰ¬ н•ҳмҳҖлӢӨ.

н•ҙлӢ№ н”„лЎңм қнҠёк°Җ лҒқлӮ¬кұ°лӮҳ мһ мӢң мӨ‘лӢЁлҗң кІҪмҡ° нҢҢмқј мқҙлҰ„л’Өм—җ .disable нҷ•мһҘмһҗлҘј л¶ҷм—¬ м„Өм •мқҙ лЎңл“ң лҗҳм§Җ м•ҠкІҢ н•ңлӢӨ.

.в”ңв”Җв”Җ authorized_keysв”ңв”Җв”Җ conf.dв”ӮВ В  в”ңв”Җв”Җ common.confв”ӮВ В  в”ңв”Җв”Җ p1.conf.disableв”ӮВ В  в”ңв”Җв”Җ p2.confв”ӮВ В  в”ңв”Җв”Җ p3.confв”ӮВ В  в”ңв”Җв”Җ p4.conf.disableв”ӮВ В  в”ңв”Җв”Җ p5.confв”ңв”Җв”Җ config

~/.ssh/config

Include conf.d/*.conf

item.title: Synergy - Software KVM
item.description:
Synergy - Software KVM

мһ‘м—…мқ„ н•ҳлӢӨ ліҙл©ҙ н•ң мұ…мғҒмң„м—җм„ң м—¬лҹ¬лҢҖмқҳ PCлЎң мһ‘м—…мқ„ н•ҙм•ј н•ҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ°к°Җ мғқкёҙлӢӨ. лӮҳмқҳ кІҪмқҳ мҳҲм „м—җ к°ңл°ңмқҖ Linux лЁёмӢ м—җм„ң л¬ём„ң мһ‘м—… л°Ҹ кё°нғҖ м—…л¬ҙлҠ” Windows PCм—җм„ң м§„н–үмқ„ н•ҳкі лҠ” н–Ҳм—ҲлҠ”лҚ° нӮӨліҙл“ңмҷҖ л§Ҳмҡ°мҠӨк°Җ н•ӯмғҒ л¬ём ңмҳҖлӢӨ. лӘЁлӢҲн„°м•ј sourceлҘј ліҖкІҪ н•ҳл©ҙ (к·Җм°®кё°лҠ” н•ҳм§Җл§Ң) мүҪкІҢ лҗҳм§Җл§Ң KeyboardмҷҖ л§Ҳмҡ°мҠӨлҘј кіөмң  н•ҳл Өл©ҙ лі„лҸ„мқҳ KVMмқ„ кө¬мһ… н•ҳм•јм•ј н•ңлӢӨ. KVM м—Ҷмқҙ кіөмң  н•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” мҶ”лЈЁм…ҳмқ„ м°ҫлӢӨк°Җ SynergyлқјлҠ” S/W KVMмқ„ м°ҫм•ҳлӢӨ.В нӮӨліҙл“ңмҷҖ л§Ҳмҡ°мҠӨл§Ңмқ„ кіөмң  н•  мҲҳ мһҲмңјлӢҲ м—„л°ҖнһҲ л§җн•ҳл©ҙ KVMмқҙ м•„лӢҲлқј KM мқҙлӢӨ. SynergyлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ңм§ҖлҠ” Open source мқјл•Ң л¶Җн„°мқҙлӢҲ 10л…„лҸ„ лҚ” м§ҖлӮ¬лӢӨ. к·ёл•Ң мқҙ мҶҢн”„нҠёмӣЁм–ҙк°Җ л„Ҳл¬ҙ л§ҲмқҢм—җ л“Өм–ҙ кё°л¶Җн•ҳкі  л°ӣмқҖ 1.8 лІ„м јмҡ© Pro LicenseлҘј м•„м§Ғ мӮ¬мҡ©к°ҖлҠҘ н•ҳлӢӨ. лӘҮл…„м „ SymlessлқјлҠ” нҡҢмӮ¬лҘј л§Ңл“Өкі  ліёкІ©м ҒмңјлЎң нҢҗл§ӨлҘј н•ҳкі  мһҲлҚ”лӢҲл§ҢВ мһ‘л…„м—җ Synergy 2к°Җ лӮҳмҷ”кі  2017л…„ л§җм—җ 2лҘј 12лӢ¬лҹ¬м—җ нҢҗл§Өн•ҳлҠ” н”„лЎңлӘЁм…ҳмқҙ мһҲм–ҙ мһҪмӢёкІҢ кө¬л§ӨлҘј н•ҳмҳҖлӢӨ. нҳ„мһ¬ Basic, Pro лІ„м „мқҙ мһҲмңјл©° к°Ғк°Ғ 29, 39 лӢ¬лҹ¬м—җ нҢҗл§Ө лҗҳкі  мһҲлӢӨ. https://symless.com/

Installation

Configuration

item.title: System Level Linux DNS over TLS on Arch Linux
item.description:
System Level Linux DNS over TLS on Arch Linux

Prerequisite

  • stubby
  • dnsmasq

Installation

stubby

sudo pacmas -S stubby

Start and endable stubby

sudo systemctl enable stubbysudo systemctl start stubby

Configuration

Open and edit /etc/stubby/stubby.yml

listen_addresses: - 127.0.0.1@53000 - 0::1@53000
upstream_recursive_servers: - address_data: 9.9.9.9 tls_auth_name: "dns.quad9.net" - address_data: 9.9.9.10 tls_auth_name: "dns.quad9.net" - address_data: 1.1.1.1 tls_auth_name: "cloudflare-dns.com" - address_data: 1.0.0.1 tls_auth_name: "cloudflare-dns.com"

dnsmasq

Arch Linux based distribution

sudo pacmas -S dnsmasq

Start and endable stubby

sudo systemctl enable dnsmasqsudo systemctl start dnsmasq

Configurations

Open and edit /etc/dnsmasq.conf

no-resolvproxy-dnssecserver=::1#53000server=127.0.0.1#53000listen-address=::1,127.0.0.1

Use dnsmasq as default DNS

Common Usages

Open and edit /etc/resolv./conf

nameserver 127.0.0.1

With NetworkManager

[main]dns=dnsmasq

item.title: Update Ubuntu Mirror Site in sources.list
item.description:
Update Ubuntu Mirror Site in sources.list

sudo sed -i 's|http://archive.ubuntu.com|http://ftp.daumkakao.com|g' /etc/apt/sources.list

item.title: Usages of SSH key pair
item.description:
Usages of SSH key pair

Generate SSH key pair

ssh-keygen

ssh-keygen -t rsa -b 4096 -f test
  • test.pub: Public Key
  • test: Private Key

Use key

Copy to remote system

Copy Public key to $REMOTE_HOST

ssh-copy-id $USER@$REMOTE_HOST -i test

or, if there is no public key in remote host

scp ~/.ssh/test.pub $USER@$REMOTE_HOST:.ssh/authorized_keys

Login use Private Key

ssh $USER@$REMOTE_HOST -i .ssh/test

./ssh/config

Edit ~/.ssh/config as following.

Host 1.2.3.4 test Hostname 1.2.3.4 User username Port 22 SendEnv LANG LC_* IdentityFile ~/.ssh/test

Connect remote system using ssh command

ssh test

item.title: VirtualBoxм—җм„ң 4к°ң мқҙмғҒмқҳ л„ӨнҠёмӣҢнҒ¬ мқён„°нҺҳмқҙмҠӨ(NIC) м„Өм •н•ҳкё°
item.description:
More than 4 NICs in VirtualBox

VirtualBoxм—җм„ң 4к°ң мқҙмғҒмқҳ л„ӨнҠёмӣҢнҒ¬ мқён„°нҺҳмқҙмҠӨ(NIC) м„Өм •н•ҳкё°

VirtualBoxм—җм„ңм„ң л„ӨнҠёмӣҢнҒ¬лҘј кө¬м„ұн•ҳм—¬ н…ҢмҠӨнҠёнҷҳкІҪмқ„ л§Ңл“ӨлӢӨ ліҙл©ҙ 4к°ң мқҙмғҒмқҳ NIC мқҙ н•„мҡ” н• л•Ңк°Җ мў…мў… мһҲлӢӨ. н•ҳм§Җл§Ң UIм—җм„ңлҠ” 4к°ң к№Ңм§Җл§Ң NICмқ„ м„Өм • к°ҖлҠҘн•ҳкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ Command Line InterfaceлҘј нҶөн•ҙ NICмқ„ мғқм„ұн•ҳкі  м„Өм • н•ҳм—¬м•ј н•ңлӢӨ. м„Өм • л°©лІ•мқҖ лӢӨмқҢкіј к°ҷлӢӨ. к°Ғ лӘЁл“ңм—җ лҢҖн•ң мһҗм„ён•ң лӮҙмҡ©мқҖ лӢӨмқҢ нҺҳмқҙм§ҖлҘј м°ёмЎ° н•ҳкё° л°”лһҖлӢӨ. https://www.virtualbox.org/manual/ch06.html

Bridge Mode

VBoxManage modifyvm test-vm --nic5 bridgedVBoxManage modifyvm test-vm --bridgeadapter5 eno1

Host Only Mode

VBoxManage modifyvm test-vm --nic5 hostonlyVBoxManage modifyvm test-vm --hostonlyadapter5 vboxnet0

Internal Mode

VBoxManage modifyvm test-vm --nic5 intnetVBoxManage modifyvm test-vm --intnet5 'intnet0'

NAT Mode

VBoxManage modifyvm test-vm --nic5 nat

NAT Network Mode

VBoxManage modifyvm test-vm --nic5 natnetworkVBoxManage modifyvm test-vm --nat-network5 test-nat

item.title: Welcome to euikook's wiki pages
item.description:
Welcome to euikook’s wiki pages

мқҙкіімқҖ м Җмқҳ к°ңмқё мң„нӮӨ мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

л©”лӘЁк°Җ н•„мҡ”н•ҳлӢӨкі  мғқк°ҒлҗҳлҠ” лӮҙмҡ©л“Өмқ„ кё°лЎқ н•ҳкё° мң„н•ҙ л§Ңл“  нҺҳмқҙм§Җ мһ…лӢҲлӢӨ.

Override git user name and email address temporarily

alias git='git -c "user.name=euikook" -c "user.email=ekkim@netvisiontel.com"'
alias git='git -c "user.name=euikook" -c "user.email=euikook@gmail.com"'
alias git='git -c "user.name=euikook" -c "user.email=euikook@harues.com"'

item.title: к°ңл°ңмһҗмҷҖ мӢңмҠӨн…ң кҙҖлҰ¬мһҗмқҳ м№ңкө¬ tmux, GNU screen Alternative - 01
item.description:
Usages of tmux, GNU screen Alternative

к°ңл°ңмһҗмҷҖ мӢңмҠӨн…ң кҙҖлҰ¬мһҗмқҳ м№ңкө¬ tmux, GNU screen Alternative - 01

к°ңл°ңмһҗмҷҖ мӢңмҠӨн…ң кҙҖлҰ¬мһҗмқҳ м№ңкө¬, tmux м—җ лҢҖн•ҳм—¬ м•Ңм•„ліҙмһҗ

tmuxлҠ” GNU screenмқ„ лҢҖмІҙ н•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” к°ҖмһҘ л§Өл Ҙм Ғмқё лҢҖм•ҲмқҙлӢӨ. Terminal Multiplex лЎң л§Өлүҙм–јмқҖ лӢӨмқҢм—җм„ң ліј мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.

http://man.openbsd.org/OpenBSD-current/man1/tmux.1

tmuxмқҳ мЈјмҡ” кё°лҠҘм—җ лҢҖн•ҳм—¬ м•Ңм•„ліёлӢӨ.В лЁјм Җ м„ём…ҳ мң м§Җ кё°лҠҘкіј нҷ”л©ҙ кіөмң  кё°лҠҘм—җ лҢҖн•ҳм—¬ м•Ңм•„ліҙмһҗ.

м„ём…ҳ мң м§Җ кё°лҠҘ

PuTTYл“ұмңјлЎң SSH м„ём…ҳмқ„ м—°кІ° н•ң нӣ„ н”„лЎңк·ёлһЁмқ„ мӢӨн–үн•ҳм—¬ мһ‘м—… лҸ„мӨ‘ л„ӨнҠёмӣҢнҒ¬ л¬ём ң л“ұмңјлЎң м„ём…ҳмқҙ лҒҠкІјкё°л©ҙ Logoutмқҙ лҗҳл©ҙм„ң н•ҙлӢ№ мүҳм—җм„ң мһ‘м—… мӨ‘мқҙлҚҳ лӘЁл“  мһ‘м—…мқҙ Hangup Signal (SIGHUP)мқ„ л°ӣм•„ TerminationВ  лҗңлӢӨ. мһҗм№« мһ‘м—…н•ң лӮҙмҡ©мқ„ мһғм–ҙ лІ„лҰҙ мҲҳлҸ„ мһҲлӢӨ.

мҳҲлҘј л“Өм–ҙ м•„лһҳмҷҖ к°ҷмқҖ мғҒнҷ©л“Өмқҙ мһҲмқ„ мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.

  • мһҘмӢңк°„ лҜёмӮ¬мҡ©мңјлЎң мқён•ӯ м„ём…ҳ н•ҙм ң
  • Windows мһҗлҸҷ м—…лҚ°мқҙнҠёлЎң мқён•ң мӢңмҠӨн…ң мһ¬мӢңмһ‘мңјлЎң мқён•ң м„ём…ҳ н•ҙм ң
  • л„ӨнҠёмӣҢнҒ¬ л¶Ҳм•ҲмңјлЎң мқён•ң м„ём…ҳ н•ҙм ң
  • м •м „л“ұ м „мӣҗ л¶Ҳм•ҲмңјлЎң мқён•ң м„ём…ҳ н•ҙм ң

TMUX м„ём…ҳмқ„ мғқм„ұ н•ңлӢӨ.

tmux
tmux new-session -s test

лҳҗлҠ” к°„лӢЁнһҲ

tmux new -s test

tmux м„ём…ҳ лӮҙм—җм„ң vi лӘ…л №мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё н•ҙліёлӢӨ.

vi test.txt

н•„мҡ”н•ң мһ‘м—…мқ„ м§„н–үн•ңлӢӨ.

н„°лҜёл„җмқ„ лӢ«кұ°лӮҳ л„ӨнҠёмӣҢнҒ¬лҘј лҒҠм–ҙ SSH м„ём…ҳмқ„ мў…лЈҢмӢңнӮЁлӢӨ.

лӢӨмӢң SSH м„ём…ҳмқ„ м—°кІ° нӣ„В tmux list-sessionsВ лӘ…л №мңјлЎң нҳ„м ң м—ҙл Ө мһҲлҠ” м„ём…ҳмқ„ нҷ•мқён•ңлӢӨ.

tmux list-sessiontest: 1 windows (created Tue Mar 6 15:20:04 2018) \[159x92\] (attached)

мқҙм „м—җ мғқм„ұн•ң test м„ём…ҳмқҙ ліҙмқёлӢӨ. testВ м„ём…ҳм—җ attach н•ңлӢӨ.

м„ём…ҳмқҙ н•ҳлӮҳмқҙкұ°лӮҳ л§Ҳм§Җл§ү мғқм„ұлҗң м„ём…ҳмңјлЎң attach н•ҳкё° мң„н•ҙм„ң лҠ” к°„лӢЁнһҲ лӢӨмқҢмқ„ мһ…л Ҙн•ңлӢӨ.

tmux attach-session

м„ём…ҳ мқҙлҰ„мңјлЎң attach,В В test м„ём…ҳм—җ attach

tmux attach-session -t test _**attach-session**_В commandлҠ”В _**attach**_В лӮҳВ _**a**_В лЎң лҢҖмІҙ к°ҖлҠҘн•ҳлӢӨ. ```bash tmux attach -t test
tmux a -t test

нҷ”л©ҙ кіөмң  кё°лҠҘ

нҷ”л©ҙмқ„ лӢӨлҘё мӮ¬лһҢкіј кіөмң  н•  мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.

лҸҷмқј мң м ҖмҷҖ нҷ”л©ҙ кіөмң 

к°ҷмқҖ кі„м •лЎң мӢңмҠӨн…ңм—җ лЎңк·ёмқё н•ң кІҪмҡ°

Terminal 1

SSH ClientлҘј мқҙмҡ©н•ҳм—¬ мӢңмҠӨн…ңм—җ лЎңк·ёмқё н•ң нӣ„ tmux м„ём…ҳмқ„ мғқм„ұн•ңлӢӨ.

tmux new -s test-01

Terminal 2

лӢӨлҘё SSH ClientлҘј мқҙмҡ©н•ҳм—¬ мӢңмҠӨн…ңм—җ лЎңк·ёмқё н•ң нӣ„В tmux list-sessionsВ лӘ…л №мңјлЎң нҳ„мһ¬ м—ҙл Ө мһҲлҠ” м„ём…ҳ лҰ¬мҠӨнҠёлҘј нҷ•мқён•ңлӢӨ.

tmux list-sessionstest-01: 1 windows (created Tue Mar 6 15:52:45 2018) [159x92] (attached)

tmux attach-sessionВ лӘ…л №мңјлЎң test-01 м„ём…ҳм—җ Attach н•ңлӢӨ.

tmux attach -t test-01

н„°лҜёл„җ 1кіј н„°лҜёл„җ 2м—җ к°ҷмқҖ нҷ”л©ҙмқҙ ліҙмқҙл©° н•ңмӘҪм—җм„ң нӮӨліҙл“ңлҘј мһ…л Ҙ н•ҳл©ҙ лӢӨлҘёмӘҪ н„°лҜёл„җм—җм„ңлҸ„ мһ…л ҘлҗңлӢӨ.

лӢӨлҘё мң м ҖмҷҖ нҷ”л©ҙ кіөмң 

tmux_к°Җ мӢӨн–үлҗҳл©ҙ /tmp/tmux-${UID}_ л””л үн„°лҰ¬м—җ _default_В лқјлҠ” мқҙлҰ„мқҳ UNIX мҶҢмј“мқҙ мғқм„ұлҗҳлҠ”лҚ° мқҙ UNIX мҶҢмј“мқ„ нҶөн•ҙ нҷ”л©ҙ кіөмң  кё°лҠҘмқҙ мҲҳн–үлҗңлӢӨ. -S мҳөм…ҳмқ„ нҶөн•ҙ лӘ…мӢңм ҒмңјлЎң UNIX Domain Socket нҢҢмқјмқ„ м§Җм • н•  мҲҳ мһҲмқҙл©° н•ҙлӢ№ UNIX Domain Socket мқҳ кІҪлЎңлҘјВ  лӢӨлҘё мң м Җм—җкІҢ м•Ңл Ө мӨҢмңјлЎңмҚЁ лӢӨлҘё мң м Җк°Җ лӮҙк°Җ л§Ңл“  _tmux_ м„ём…ҳм—җ м ‘мҶҚ н•  мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.

лЁјм Җ кіөмң н•ҳкі мһҗ н•ҳлҠ” User мҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ мҶҚн•ҳлҠ” Groupмқ„ мғқм„ұн•ңлӢӨ.

sudo addgroup --gid 888 tmuxsudo usermod -aG tmux myaccountsudo usermod -aG tmux otheraccount

Terminal 1

Unix Domain Socketмқ„ м§Җм • н•ҳм—¬ м„ём…ҳмқ„ л§Ңл“ лӢӨ.

tmux -S /tmp/tmux-shared new -s test-01

Terminal 2

лӢӨлҘё мң м ҖлЎң лЎңк·ёмқё н•ҳм—¬ attach н•ҙліёлӢӨ.

tmux -S /tmp/tmux-shared a -t test-01error connecting to /tmp/tmux-shared (Permission denied)

/tmp/tmux-shared нҢҢмқјм—җ к¶Ңн•ңмқҙ м—Ҷм–ҙ Unix Domain Socketм—җ м ‘мҶҚн•  мҲҳ м—ҶлӢӨ.

н•ҙлӢ№ нҢҢмқјмқҳ к¶Ңн•ңмқ„ нҷ•мқён•ҙліҙмһҗ

ls -l /tmp/tmux-shared srwxrwx--- 1 myaccount myaccount 0 Mar 6 16:25 /tmp/tmux-shared

otherкІҪмҡ° н•ҙлӢ№ нҢҢмқјм—җ лҢҖн•ҳм—¬ R/W Permissionмқҙ м—ҶмңјлҜҖлЎң Unix Domain Socketмқ„ Open н•  мҲҳ м—ҶлӢӨ.

Terminal 1

м„ём…ҳмқ„ мғқм„ұн•ң мң м ҖлЎң лЎңк·ёмқё н•ҳм—¬ н•ҙлӢ№ нҢҢмқјмқҳ Owner Groupмқ„ м•һм„ң мғқм„ұн•ң tmuxлЎң ліҖкІҪн•ңлӢӨ.

ls -l /tmp/tmux-shared srwxrwx--- 1 myaccount myaccount 0 Mar 6 16:25 /tmp/tmux-sharedchgrp tmux tmux-shared
ls -l /tmp/tmux-shared srwxrwx--- 1 myaccount tmux 0 Mar 6 16:25 /tmp/tmux-shared

Terminal 2

Permissionмқ„ ліҖкІҪ н•ҳмҳҖмңјл©ҙ мқҙм ң м„ём…ҳм—җ Attach н•ҙліҙмһҗ.

tmux -S /tmp/tmux-shared attach -t test-01

м ‘мҶҚмқҙ лҗҳкі  н•ҳл©ҙ кіөмң м—ӯмӢң мһҳлҗңлӢӨ.

мӮҙм§қ м•„мү¬мҡҙм җ.

м•„мүҪкІҢлҸ„ м•„м§Ғ screenкіј к°ҷмқҙ ACLмқ„ нҶөн•ҙ read-only лӘЁл“ңлЎң нҷ”л©ҙмқ„ кіөмң  н•ҳлҠ” л°©лІ•мқҖ м—ҶлӢӨ. Attach н•ҳл ӨлҠ” мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗк°Җ -r мҳөм…ҳмқ„ нҶөн•ҙ лӘ…мӢңм ҒмңјлЎң read-only лӘЁл“ңлЎң Attach н•ҳм—¬м•ј н•ңлӢӨ.

tmux -S /tmp/tmux-shared attach -t test-01 -r

мҡ”м•Ҫ

м„ём…ҳ мғқм„ұ

tmux new-session -s test

new-sessionмқҖ newлЎң лҢҖмІҙ к°ҖлҠҘн•ҳлӢӨ.

м„ём…ҳм—җ attach

tmux attach-session -t test

attach-sessionмқҖ attachлӮҳ aлЎң лҢҖмІҙ к°ҖлҠҘн•ҳлӢӨ.

м ‘мҶҚн•  Unix Domain Socketмқ„ м§Җм • н•ҳл Өл©ҙ -S мҳөм…ҳмқ„ мӮ¬мҡ©н•ңлӢӨ.

tmux attach-session -S /tmp/test-socket -t test

лӢӨлҘё мң м Җм—җкІҢ нҷ”л©ҙмқ„ кіөмң  н•ҳкё° мң„н•ҙм„ңлҠ” н•ҙлӢ№ мң м Җк°Җ лӮҙк°Җ л§Ңл“  Unix Domain Socketм—җ м ‘к·ј к¶Ңн•ңмқҙ мһҲм–ҙм•ј н•ңлӢӨ.

лӢӨмқҢ нҸ¬мҠӨнҠём—җм„ңлҠ” tmuxмқҳ к°ҖмһҘ нҺёлҰ¬н•ң кё°лҠҘмқё нҷ”л©ҙ л¶„н•  кё°лҠҘм—җ лҢҖн•ҳм—¬ м•Ңм•„ліҙмһҗ

item.title: мҷң л””л үн„°лҰ¬ Hard linkлҘј л§Ңл“Ө мҲҳ м—ҶлӮҳмҡ”?
item.description:
Why Hard Link Not Allowed for Directory

мҷң л””л үн„°лҰ¬ Hard linkлҘј л§Ңл“Ө мҲҳ м—ҶлӮҳмҡ”?

В  л””л үн„°лҰ¬ Hard LinkлҘј л§Ңл“Өкі  мӢ¶м§Җл§Ң л§Ңл“Өм–ҙ м§Җм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ.

мҳҲм „м—җлҠ”В rootВ к¶Ңн•ңмңјлЎңВ -dВ мҳөм…Ҙмқ„ мЈјл©ҙ л§Ңл“Өм–ҙ м§„кІғ к°ҷмқҖлҚ°В _Ubuntu 16.04_м—җм„ң н…ҢмҠӨнҠё н•ҙліҙлӢҲВ rootВ к¶Ңн•ңмңјлЎңлҸ„ л””л үн„°лҰ¬ Hard Linkк°Җ л§Ңл“Өм–ҙ м§Җм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ.

mkdir aln a bln: a: hard link not allowed for directory

л””л үн„°лҰ¬ Hard LinkлҠ” м—¬лҹ¬ л¬ём ңм җмқ„ м•јкё° мӢңнӮЁлӢӨ. л””л үн„°лҰ¬ Hard Linkм—җ мқҳн•ҙ л°ңмғқн•  мҲҳ мһҲлҠ” л¬ём ңм җл“Өм—җ лҢҖн•ҳм—¬ м•Ңм•„ліёлӢӨ.

нҢҢмқјмӢңмҠӨн…ңм—җ лЈЁн”„лҘј л§Ңл“ лӢӨ.

mkdir -p ~/a/bcd ~/a/bln ~/a c

л¬ҙн•ңлҢҖмқҳ к№ҠмқҙлҘј к°Җм§ҖлҠ” л””л үн„°лҰ¬ лЈЁн”„к°Җ л§Ңл“Өм–ҙ мЎҢлӢӨ.

cd ~/a/b/c/b/c/b/c/b/c/b/c/b/c/b/c/...

-maxdepthВ м—ҶмқҙВ findВ лӘ…л Ҙмқ„ мӢӨн–ү н•ҳл©ҙ мқҙ лӘ…л №мқҖ л””л үн„°лҰ¬ лЈЁн”„м—җм„ң мӢӨн–үлҗңлӢӨ. мқҙлҠ” мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗмӮ¬ л””л үн„°лҰ¬ лЈЁн”„лҘј к°Җм§ҖлҠ” л””л үн„°лҰ¬м—җ лҢҖн•ҳм—¬ мЈјмҡ” лӘ…л №м–ҙмқё find лӘ…л №мқ„ мӮ¬мҡ© н•  мҲҳ м—ҶмқҢмқ„ мқҳлҜё н•ңлӢӨ. мқҙлҠ” мЈјмҡ” лӘ…л №мқёВ locateВ м—җм„ңлҸ„ к°ҷмқҙ м Ғмҡ© лҗңлӢӨ.

Treeмқҳ м •мқҳм—җлҠ” Loopк°Җ м—Ҷкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ нҢҢмқјмӢңмҠӨн…ңмқҖ лҚ”мқҙмғҒ Treeк°Җ м•„лӢҲкІҢ лҗҳлҠ” кІғмқҙлӢӨ.

мғҒмң„л””л үн„°лҰ¬мқҳ лӘ…лЈҢм„ұмқ„ к№ЁнҠёлҰ°лӢӨ.

мң„мқҳ Loop мҳҲм ңм—җм„ң м—¬лҹ¬к°ңмқҳ мғҒмң„ л””л үн„°лҰ¬к°Җ мЎҙмһ¬н•ҳкІҢ лҗңлӢӨ.

cd ~/a/bcd ~/a/b/c/b

мІ«лІҲм§ё мјҖмқҙмҠӨм—җм„ң ~/aлҠ” ~/a/bмқҳ мғҒмң„ л””л үн„°лҰ¬мқҙлӢӨ. л‘җлІҲм§ё мјҖмқҙмҠӨм—җм„ң ~/a/b/c лҠ” ~/a/b/c/bмқҳ мғҒмң„ л””л үн„°лҰ¬мқҙл©° мқҙлҠ” ~/a/bмҷҖ лҸҷмқјн•ҳлӢӨ.

л”°лқјм„ң ~/a/bлҠ” 2к°ңмқҳ мғҒмң„ л””л үн„°лҰ¬лҘј к°Җм§„лӢӨ.

н•ҳлӮҳмқҳ нҢҢмқјмқҙ м—¬лҹ¬ нҢҢмқјлЎң н‘ңнҳ„лҗңлӢӨ.

лҰ¬лҲ…мҠӨ/мң лӢүмҠӨ мӢңмҠӨн…ңм—җм„ң нҢҢмқјмқҖ кІҪлЎңм—җ мқҳн•ҙ мӢқлі„лҗңлӢӨ. (мӢ¬ліјлҰӯ л§ҒнҒ¬мқҳ кІҪмҡ° мӢӨм ң кІҪлЎңлҘј resolving н•ң нӣ„ мӢӨлі„лҗЁ.)

мҳҲмқ„ л“Өм–ҙ,

~/a/b/foo.txt~/a/b/c/b/foo.txt

мң„мқҳ л‘җ нҢҢмқјмқҖ лӢӨлҘё нҢҢмқјлЎң мӢқлі„лҗңлӢӨ. мң„ мҳҲм ңм—җм„ң к°Ғ pathмқҳ foo.txtлҠ” н•ҳлӮҳмқҳ inode лІҲнҳёлҘј к°Җм§Җм§Җл§Ң мқҙлҘј мӢқлі„ н•ҳкё° мң„н•ң PathлҠ” л¬ҙн•ңлҢҖлЎң мЎҙм ң н•ңлӢӨ. мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗлҠ” мһҗмӢ мқҙ лӘ…мӢңм ҒмңјлЎң LoopлҘј мғқм„ұн•ҳмҳҖмқ„ кІҪмҡ°лҘј м ңмҷён•ҳкі лҠ” мқҙлҘј мІҙнҒ¬н•ҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ.

л””л үн„°лҰ¬ н•ҳл“ңл§ҒнҒ¬лҠ” мһҗмӢ мқҳ н•ҳмң„ л””л үн„°лҰ¬ лҳҗлҠ” н•ҳмң„ л””л үн„°лҰ¬лӮҳ мғҒмң„ л””л үн„°лҰ¬к°Җ м•„лӢҢ м–ҙл–Ө л””л үн„°лҰ¬лҸ„ к°ҖлҰ¬нӮ¬ мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ. мқҙ кІҪмҡ° н•ҙлӢ№ л””л үн„°лҰ¬мқҳ н•ҳмң„ н•ӯлӘ©л“ӨмқҖ 2к°ңмқҳ нҢҢмқјлЎң ліөм ңлҗҳл©°, 2к°ңмқҳ кІ°лЎңлЎң мӢқлі„лҗңлӢӨ.

ln /one /one-hard echo foo > /one-hard/foobar.txt diff -s /one/foobar.txt /one-hard/foobar.txtecho bar >> /one/foobar.txt diff -s /one/foobar.txt /one-hard/foobar.txt cat /one/foobar.txt foo bar

В 

к·ёл ҮлӢӨл©ҙ л””л үн„°лҰ¬м—җ мҶҢн”„нҠёл§ҒнҒ¬к°Җ м–ҙл–»кІҢ лҸҷмһ‘ н•ҳлҠ”к°Җ?

мҶҢн”„нҠёл§ҒнҒ¬лӮҳ мҶҢн”„нҠёл§ҒнҒ¬к°Җ нҸ¬н•Ёлҗң л””л үн„°лҰ¬ лЈЁн”„лҘј нҸ¬н•ҳлҠ” кІҪлЎңлҠ” мў…мў… нҢҢмқјмқ„ мӢқлі„н•ҳкұ°лӮҳ м—¬лҠ”лҚ°л§Ң мӮ¬мҡ©лҗ©лӢҲлӢӨ. мқҙкІғмқҖ м •мғҒм Ғмқё кІҪлЎңлӮҳ м„ нҳ• кІҪлЎң мІҳлҹј мӮ¬мҡ©лҗ  мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.

н•ҳм§Җл§ҢкІҪлЎңк°Җ нҢҢмқј л№„көҗм—җ мӮ¬мҡ©лҗҳлҠ” кІҪмҡ°, Symbolic LinkлҘј лЁјм Җ н•ҙм„қн•ҳм—¬ мөңмҶҢ кІҪлЎңлЎң ліҖнҷҳн•ҳм—¬ мқјл°ҳм ҒмңјлЎң лҸҷмқҳ лҗң н‘ңнҳ„мқёВ canonical pathВ лҘј л§Ңл“Ө мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.

мқҙлҠ” лӘЁл“  мҶҢн”„нҠёл§ҒнҒ¬к°Җ л§ҒнҒ¬ м—Ҷмқҙ нҷ•мһҘлҗ  мҲҳ мһҲкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ к°ҖлҠҘн•ҳлӢӨ. кІҪлЎңм—җ мһҲлҠ” лӘЁл“  мҶҢн”„нҠёл§ҒнҒ¬лҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ мқҙ мһ‘м—…мқ„ мҲҳн–үн•ң нӣ„ лӮЁм•„ мһҲлҠ” кІҪлЎңлҠ” н•ӯмғҒ кІҪлЎңк°Җ лӘ…нҷ•н•ң нҠёлҰ¬мқҳ мқјл¶Җк°Җ лҗңлӢӨ.

readlinkВ лӘ…л №мңјлЎң м •мӢқ кІҪлЎңлҘј н•ҙм„қн•  мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.

readlink -f /some/symlinked/path

Soft links are different from what the filesystem uses

мҶҢн”„нҠё л§ҒнҠёлҠ” Filesystem лӮҙл¶Җмқҳ л§ҒнҒ¬мҷҖлҠ” лӢӨлҘҙкё° л•Ңл¬ём—җ мҶҢн”„нҠё л§ҒнҒ¬лЎң мқён•ҙ л¬ём ңк°Җ л°ңмғқн•  мҶҢм§Җк°Җ м—ҶмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ. мқҙлҠ” Hard LinkмҷҖ кө¬л¶„лҗҳл©° н•„мҡ”н•ң кІҪмҡ° Symbolic Linkк°Җ м—ҶмқҖ кІҪлЎңлЎң н•ҙм„қлҗңлӢӨ. .

м–ҙл–ӨмқҳлҜём—җм„ң Symbolic LinkлҘј м¶”к°Җ н•ҳлҠ”кІғмқҖ кё°мЎҙмқҳ нҢҢмқјмӢңмҠӨн…ң кө¬мЎ°лҘј ліҖкІҪн•ҳлҠ”кІғмқҙ м•„лӢҲлқј мң м§Җн•ҳлҠ” кІғмқҙм§Җл§Ң application кі„мёөкіј к°ҷмқҖ лҚ” л§ҺмқҖ кө¬мЎ°лҘј м¶”к°Җн•ҳлҠ” кІғмқҙлӢӨ.

л””л үн„°лҰ¬ н•ҳл“ңл§ҒнҒ¬мқҳ лҢҖм•Ҳ

-al мҳөм…ҳмқ„ мЈјкі  copy н•ңлӢӨ. л””л үн„°лҰ¬лҠ” ліөмӮ¬(мғқм„ұ)мқҙ лҗҳкі  нҢҢмқјмқҖ Hard Linkк°Җ лҗңлӢӨ.

cp -al src dst

directoryлҘј -o bind мҳөм…ҳмқ„ мЈјкі  mount н•  мҲҳ лҸ„ мһҲлҠ”лҚ° мқҙкұҙ hard linkк°Җ м•„лӢҲлқј soft linkмҷҖ к°ҷмқҙ лҸҷмһ‘ н•ҳлӢҲ PASS.
